struct Position
declare self{Ptr} : Position {Reuses: 0}
declare Position::x : int {Reuses: 0}
declare Position::y : int {Reuses: 0}

	function Position::__init__(x : int, y : int)
		Position::x{int} {Position::x}  := x{int} {x} 
		Position::y{int} {Position::y}  := y{int} {y} 
	end function

	function Position::__repr__(self{Ptr} : Position)
		return ("<Position> Object: " & self{Ptr}{Position} {self} )
	end function

end struct

struct Bitlist
declare self{Ptr} : Bitlist {Reuses: 0}
declare Bitlist::val : int {Reuses: 0}

	function Bitlist::__init__
		Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end function

	function Bitlist::load(self : Bitlist, val : int)
		Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  := val{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end function

	function Bitlist::size(self : Bitlist)
		return (32)
	end function

	function Bitlist::search(self : Bitlist)
		return (ge(Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, ge} * ((31 - int(log(real(max(1, 2147483647 .and. 	end function

	function Bitlist::clear(self : Bitlist)
		Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end function

	function Bitlist::set_all(self : Bitlist)
		Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  := -1
	end function

	function Bitlist::control_to_bitlist(self : Bitlist, ui_array : int[])

		for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to min(31, num_elements[ui_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1){UserDefined, None, min}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .set(i{unknown} {no declaration} , ui_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Undefined, None}
		end for
	end function

	function Bitlist::bitlist_to_control(self : Bitlist, ui_array : int[])

		for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to min(31, num_elements[ui_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1){UserDefined, None, min}
		set_control_par(ui_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {no declaration} , self{unknown} {no declaration} .get(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
		end for
	end function

	function Bitlist::set(self : Bitlist, idx : int, val : int)

((- val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. .not. 	end function

	function Bitlist::set_range(self : Bitlist, start_idx : int, end_idx : int, val : int)
		Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  := (eq(val{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){UserDefined, None, eq} * ((eq(end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 32){UserDefined, None, eq} * sh_right(- 1, 32){Builtin, None, sh_right}) + (Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. sh_left(.not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}, 32 - end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}))) + (eq(val{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq} * (lt(end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 32){UserDefined, None, lt} * (Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(.not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}, 32 - end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})))
	end function

	function Bitlist::get(self : Bitlist, idx : int)
		return (sh_right(Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration} , 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 1)
	end function

	function Bitlist::get_range(self : Bitlist, start_idx : int, end_idx : int)
		return ((eq(end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 32){UserDefined, None, eq} * Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration} ) + sh_left(sh_right(Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration} , 32 - end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. .not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}, 32 - end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})
	end function

	function Bitlist::reverse(self : Bitlist)
		for i : unknown in range(0, (32 / 2) + 1, 1)
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .swap(i{unknown} {no declaration} , 31 - i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		end for
	end function

	function Bitlist::swap(self : Bitlist, idx1 : int, idx2 : int)
		declare val_idx1 : int := self{unknown} {no declaration} .get(idx1{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		declare val_idx2 : int := self{unknown} {no declaration} .get(idx2{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}

		self{unknown} {no declaration} .set(idx2{unknown} {no declaration} , val_idx1{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	end function

		bl{unknown} {no declaration}  := bl{unknown} {no declaration}  & self{unknown} {no declaration} .get(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}

struct Floatmask
declare self{Ptr} : Floatmask {Reuses: 0}
declare Floatmask::fm[2] : Bitlist[] {Reuses: 0}

	function Floatmask::__init__
		Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Bitlist::__init__{Constructor, None, Bitlist::__init__}
		Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Bitlist::__init__{Constructor, None, Bitlist::__init__}
	end function

	function Floatmask::load(self : Floatmask, bl1 : Bitlist, bl2 : Bitlist)

		Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := bl2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end function

		Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := val2{unknown} {no declaration}

	function Floatmask::copy(self : Floatmask, other : Floatmask)

		Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .load(other.fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		end if
	end function

	function Floatmask::size(self : Floatmask)
		return (64)
	end function

	function Floatmask::search(self : Floatmask)
		return (((bool(Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, bool} * Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .search{Undefined, None}) + (eq(Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq} * Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .search{Undefined, None})) + (32 * bool(Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, bool}))
	end function

	function Floatmask::clear(self : Floatmask)
		Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .clear{Undefined, None}
		Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .clear{Undefined, None}

	function Floatmask::count(self : Floatmask, val : int)

	end function

	function Floatmask::set(self : Floatmask, idx : int, val : int)
		Floatmask::fm[idx{unknown} {no declaration}  / 32]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := (Floatmask::fm[idx{unknown} {no declaration}  / 32]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, (31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ) mod 32){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .or. sh_left(val{unknown} {no declaration} , (31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ) mod 32){Builtin, None, sh_left}
	end function

	function Floatmask::set_range(self : Floatmask, start_idx : int, end_idx : int, val : int)
		Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .set_range(min(32, start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min}, min(32, end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min}, val{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}

		ret.fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .get_range(min(32, start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min}, min(32, end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min}){Undefined, None}

	function Floatmask::print(self : Floatmask)

		bl{unknown} {no declaration}  := bl{unknown} {no declaration}  & "]"

	function Floatmask::sh_left(self : Floatmask, pos : int)
		if(pos{unknown} {no declaration}  < 32)
		Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := sh_left(Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left} .or. sh_right_safe(Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , 32 - pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, sh_right_safe}

		else
		Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := sh_left(Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , pos{unknown} {no declaration}  - 32){Builtin, None, sh_left}
		Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		end if
	end function

	function Floatmask::sh_right(self : Floatmask, pos : int)
		if(pos{unknown} {no declaration}  < 32)
		Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := sh_right_safe(Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, sh_right_safe} .or. sh_left(Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , 32 - pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}
		Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := sh_right_safe(Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, sh_right_safe}
		else
		Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := sh_right_safe(Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , pos{unknown} {no declaration}  - 32){UserDefined, None, sh_right_safe}
		Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		end if
	end function

	function Floatmask::__and__(self : Floatmask, other : Floatmask)
		declare ret : unknown := Floatmask{Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		ret.fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. other.fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		ret.fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. other.fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		return (ret{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end function

	function Floatmask::__or__(self : Floatmask, other : Floatmask)
		declare ret : unknown := Floatmask{Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		ret.fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. other.fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		ret.fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. other.fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		return (ret{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end function

	function Floatmask::__invert__(self : Floatmask)
		declare ret : unknown := Floatmask{Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		ret.fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := .not. Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		ret.fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := .not. Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		return (ret{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end function

	function Floatmask::__eq__(self : Floatmask, other : Floatmask)
		return (eq(((Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  - other.fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} ) + Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} ) - other.fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq})
	end function

	function Floatmask::empty(self : Floatmask)
		return (ne(bool(Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  + Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, bool}){UserDefined, None, ne})
	end function

	function Floatmask::__repr__(self{Ptr} : Floatmask)
		return ("<Floatmask> Object: " & self{Ptr}{Floatmask} {self} )
	end function

const preset
declare const preset.VERSION_IDX : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
declare const preset.DELETED_IDX : unknown := 1 {Reuses: 0}

declare preset[8] : unknown := [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, preset.CONTENT_IDX{unknown} {no declaration}  + 5] {Reuses: 0}
end const
declare const PRESET_VERSION : unknown := 2 {Reuses: 0}
struct Preset
declare self{Ptr} : Preset {Reuses: 0}
declare Preset::id : int {Reuses: 0}
declare Preset::name : string {Reuses: 0}
declare Preset::tags : Floatmask {Reuses: 0}
declare Preset::icon : int {Reuses: 0}
declare Preset::file : string {Reuses: 0}
declare Preset::deleted : int {Reuses: 0}

	function Preset::__init__(id : int, name : string, tags : Floatmask, icon : int, file : string, deleted : int)
		Preset::id{unknown} {no declaration}  := id{unknown} {no declaration} 
		Preset::name{unknown} {no declaration}  := name{unknown} {no declaration} 
		if(tags{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil)

		Preset::deleted{unknown} {no declaration}  := deleted{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end function

	function Preset::write(self : Preset, array : int[])

	end function

	function Categories::update_tags(self : Categories, control_array : int[])

	function Categories::update_active_tags(self : Categories)

	end function

	function Categories::set_instrument_tags(self : Categories, instrument_idx : int)

	function Categories::get_tag_category(self : Categories, tag_idx : int)

		return (i{unknown} {no declaration} )
		end if
		end for
		return (- 1)
	end function

	end function

		Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := i{unknown} {no declaration}

		end if

	function Browser::filter_presets(self : Browser)
		Browser::filtered_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := [nil]
		message("Filtering presets..."){Builtin, None, message}
		declare allowed : int {Reuses: 0}
		declare z : int {Reuses: 0}
		for i : unknown in range(0, Browser::num_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
		declare preset : Floatmask := Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		for v : unknown in range(0, 5, 1)
		declare current_filtermethod : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .filtermethod[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		if(current_filtermethod{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.ADDITIVE{unknown} {no declaration} )
		preset{unknown} {no declaration}  := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. preset.get_range(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(v{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}, self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(v{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Undefined, None}){Undefined, None}
		declare bit_count : int := preset.count(1){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		if((bit_count{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) or (self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .active[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
		allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  := allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  + self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .elements[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		else
		break
		end if
		else
		if((current_filtermethod{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.SUBTRACTIVE{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (current_filtermethod{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.TOGGLE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
		preset{unknown} {no declaration}  := .not. self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. preset{unknown} {no declaration} 
		declare bit_count : int := preset.get_range(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(v{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}, self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(v{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Undefined, None}){Undefined, None}.count(1){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  := allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  + bit_count{unknown} {no declaration} 
		end if
		end if
		end for
		if(allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  = 17)
		Browser::filtered_presets[z{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		inc(z{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end if
		Browser::num_shown_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := z{unknown} {no declaration} 
		allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		end for
	end function

	function Browser::matches_all_categories_except(self : Browser, preset_tags : Floatmask, ignore_cat : int)
		for cat : unknown in range(0, 5, 1)
		if(cat{unknown} {no declaration}  = ignore_cat{unknown} {no declaration} )
		continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		end if
		declare b : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(cat{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		declare e : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(cat{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		if(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .active[cat{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
		continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		end if
		declare p_slice : unknown := preset_tags.get_range(b{unknown} {no declaration} , e{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		declare sel_slice : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .get_range(b{unknown} {no declaration} , e{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		declare merged : Floatmask := p_slice{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sel_slice{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		if(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .filtermethod[cat{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.ADDITIVE{unknown} {no declaration} )
		if(merged.count(1){Undefined, None} = 0)
		return (0)
		end if
		else
		if(merged.__eq__(sel_slice{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} = 0)
		return (0)
		end if
		end if
		end for
		return (1)
	end function

	function Browser::update_disabled_tags(self : Browser)
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tagmask{unknown} {no declaration} .clear{Undefined, None}
		for cat : unknown in range(0, 5, 1)
		declare cat_begin : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(cat{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		declare cat_end : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(cat{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		declare need : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .elements[cat{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		declare avail : unknown := Floatmask::__init__{Constructor, None, Floatmask::__init__} {Reuses: 0}
		avail.clear{Undefined, None}
		for i : unknown in range(0, Browser::num_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
		declare p : unknown := Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		if((p{unknown} {no declaration}  = nil) or (p.deleted{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1))
		continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		end if
		declare p_slice : unknown := p.tags.get_range(cat_begin{unknown} {no declaration} , cat_end{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		if(p_slice.count(1){Undefined, None} = 0)
		continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		end if
		if(self{unknown} {no declaration} .matches_all_categories_except(p.tags{unknown} {no declaration} , cat{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} = 1)
		avail{unknown} {no declaration}  := avail{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. p_slice{unknown} {no declaration} 
		if(avail.get_range(cat_begin{unknown} {no declaration} , cat_end{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}.count(1){Undefined, None} = need{unknown} {no declaration} )
		break
		end if
		end if
		end for
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tagmask{unknown} {no declaration} .set_range(cat_begin{unknown} {no declaration} , cat_end{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Undefined, None}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tagmask{unknown} {no declaration}  := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tagmask{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. avail.get_range(cat_begin{unknown} {no declaration} , cat_end{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		end for
	end function

	function Browser::is_user_preset(self : Browser, preset : Preset)
		if(preset{unknown} {no declaration}  = nil)
		return (0)
		end if
		return (preset.tags.get(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .user_tag{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None})
	end function

	function Browser::save_options(self : Browser, title : string, control_array : int[], user_preset : int)
		Browser::current_state{unknown} {no declaration}  := browser_state.SAVING{unknown} {no declaration} 
		if((Browser::current_save_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  = save_mode.EDIT_TAGS{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (Browser::current_save_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  = save_mode.SAVE_NEW{unknown} {no declaration} ))
		declare new_preset : Preset := Preset::__init__(0, "", nil, 0, "", 0){Constructor, None, Preset::__init__} {Reuses: 0}
		new_preset.copy(Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  := title{unknown} {no declaration} 
		new_preset.tags.load_control_array(control_array{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		new_preset.tags.set(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .user_tag{unknown} {no declaration} , user_preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		new_preset.icon{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_current_articulation_icon{UserDefined, None, get_current_articulation_icon}
		message("Current articulation icon: " & ", " & new_preset.icon{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		declare path : string := dev_keys.get_preset_path(user_preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, dev_keys.get_preset_path} {Reuses: 0}
		declare idx : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .instruments{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		new_preset.tags.set(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + get_currently_opened_instrument_idx{UserDefined, None, get_currently_opened_instrument_idx}, 1){Undefined, None}
		declare compatible : int := articulation_compatible_with_ensemble(selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_compatible_with_ensemble} {Reuses: 0}
		new_preset.tags.set(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .ensemble_tag{unknown} {no declaration} , compatible{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		message("current tags"){Builtin, None, message}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .current{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .print{Undefined, None}
		message("new_preset tags"){Builtin, None, message}
		new_preset.tags.print{Undefined, None}
		if((Browser::current_save_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  = save_mode.EDIT_TAGS{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (user_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .delete_preset(Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		end if
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .save_preset(new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} , path{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		else
		if(Browser::current_save_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  = save_mode.DELETE_PRESET{unknown} {no declaration} )
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .delete_preset(Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		end if
		end if
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .export_favorite_array{Undefined, None}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .update_user_preset_situation{Undefined, None}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .filter_presets{Undefined, None}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .load_preset(Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		Browser::current_state{unknown} {no declaration}  := browser_state.NONE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end function

	function Browser::find_preset(self : Browser, preset_id : int)
		for i : unknown in range(0, Browser::num_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
		if(Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .id{unknown} {no declaration}  = preset_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
		return (Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
		end if
		end for
		return (nil)
	end function

	function Browser::save_preset(self : Browser, new_preset : Preset, path : string)
		declare exists : int := self{unknown} {no declaration} .preset_exists(new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka", path{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		if(self{unknown} {no declaration} .is_user_preset(new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} = 1)
		if((exists{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1))
		for user_p : unknown in Browser::user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} 
		if(user_p.id{unknown} {no declaration}  = preset.array[preset.ID_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
		user_p.copy(new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		user_p.deleted{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		break
		end if
		end for
		else
		Browser::user_presets[Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} 
		inc(Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		declare new_id : int := self{unknown} {no declaration} .validate_preset_id(10000, user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		new_preset.id{unknown} {no declaration}  := new_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
		message("New user preset added to user presets array: " & ", " & new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " with id: " & ", " & new_preset.id{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .export_user_arrays{Undefined, None}
		end if
		else
		if((exists{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1))
		for p : unknown in Browser::presets{unknown} {no declaration} 
		if(p.id{unknown} {no declaration}  = preset.array[preset.ID_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
		p.copy(new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		p.deleted{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		new_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  := p{unknown} {no declaration} 
		break
		end if
		end for
		else
		message("Adding new preset to presets array" & ", " & new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		message("Number of factory presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " Number of user presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		new_preset.id{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration} 
		Browser::presets[Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} 
		inc(Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		message("New preset added to presets array: " & ", " & new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " with idx: " & ", " & new_preset.id{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		message("Number of factory presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " Number of user presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		end if
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .export_preset_arrays{Undefined, None}
		end if
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .update_user_preset_situation{Undefined, None}
		new_preset.write(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		PresetBrowser.save_preset_array(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.save_preset_array}
		wait_async(save_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , path{unknown} {no declaration}  & new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, save_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
		Browser::last{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration} 
		Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration}  := new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} 
		message("Preset saved: " & ", " & new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " with idx: " & ", " & new_preset.id{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " in path: " & ", " & path{unknown} {no declaration}  & new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka" & ", " & " with tags: " & ", " & new_preset.tags{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	end function

	function Browser::delete_preset(self : Browser, preset : Preset)
		preset.deleted{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
		dec(Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .export_user_arrays{Undefined, None}
		declare path : string := dev_keys.get_preset_path(1){UserDefined, None, dev_keys.get_preset_path} {Reuses: 0}
		wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , path{unknown} {no declaration}  & preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
		preset.write(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		wait_async(save_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , path{unknown} {no declaration}  & preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, save_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .previous_preset{Undefined, None}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .load_preset(Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		message("Preset deleted: " & ", " & preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " with idx: " & ", " & preset.id{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	end function

	function Browser::validate_preset_id(self : Browser, idx : int, validation_array : int[])
		declare preset_exists : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
		if(search[validation_array{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1)
		declare count : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
		preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
		while(preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) 
		if(search[validation_array{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + count{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1)
		inc(count{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		else
		preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		end if
		end while
		return (count{unknown} {no declaration}  + idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
		end if
		return (idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end function

	function Browser::load_preset(self : Browser, preset : Preset)
		if((Browser::is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil))
		Browser::is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
		if(Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration}  # Browser::last{unknown} {no declaration} )
		Browser::last{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration} 
		declare path : string := dev_keys.get_preset_path(self{unknown} {no declaration} .is_user_preset(preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}){UserDefined, None, dev_keys.get_preset_path} {Reuses: 0}
		message("Loading preset from: " & path{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		declare preset_exists : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .preset_exists(preset.name{unknown} {no declaration} , path{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		message("Preset exists: " & preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		if(preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
		message("Preset not found: " & ", " & path{unknown} {no declaration}  & preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, message}
		else
		PresetBrowser.load_preset_array(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.load_preset_array}
		end if
		end if
		Browser::is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		end if
	end function

	function Browser::preset_exists(self : Browser, file_name : string, path : string)
		preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , path{unknown} {no declaration}  & file_name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
		wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , path{unknown} {no declaration}  & file_name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
		if((preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1))
		return (1)
		else
		return (0)
		end if
	end function

	function Browser::update_user_preset_situation(self : Browser)
		Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[user_preset_tags0{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]
		if(Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
		for i : unknown in range(Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , Browser::num_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
		Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := nil
		end for
		for i : unknown in range(0, Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
		declare preset : Preset := Browser::user_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		message(preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		if((preset{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil) and (preset.deleted{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
		Browser::presets[Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset{unknown} {no declaration} 
		message("User preset: " & ", " & preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " with id: " & ", " & preset.id{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " added to presets array"){Builtin, None, message}
		end if
		end for
		end if
		Browser::num_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  + Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} 
		message("Number of presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " Number of user presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	end function

	function Browser::scan_presets(self : Browser, ref file_browser : int, ref count : int, alt_key_pressed : int, user : int)
		preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, 2){Builtin, None, fs_get_filename}){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
		wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, 2){Builtin, None, fs_get_filename}){Builtin, None, load_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
		message("file name: " & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, 0){Builtin, None, fs_get_filename}){Builtin, None, message}
		if(((Browser::current_state{unknown} {no declaration}  = browser_state.SCANNING{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (Browser::current_state{unknown} {no declaration}  = browser_state.DEV_SCANNING{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 9999))
		if((preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = PRESET_VERSION{unknown} {no declaration} ) or ((PRESET_VERSION{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2) and (preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)))
		if(alt_key_pressed{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
		preset.array[preset.ID_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := self{unknown} {no declaration} .validate_preset_id(preset.array[preset.ID_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		end if
		if((Browser::current_state{unknown} {no declaration}  = browser_state.SCANNING{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
		message("Adding user preset: " & ", " & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, 0){Builtin, None, fs_get_filename}){Builtin, None, message}
		user_preset_titles[count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, 0){Builtin, None, fs_get_filename}
		user_preset_tags0[count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		user_preset_tags1[count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		user_deleted_presets[count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		user_preset_info[count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.ICON_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		preset.array[preset.ID_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := self{unknown} {no declaration} .validate_preset_id(preset.array[preset.ID_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		user_preset_numbers[count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.ID_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		inc(count{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end if
		if((Browser::current_state{unknown} {no declaration}  = browser_state.DEV_SCANNING{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
		if(count{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .delete_instrument_from_arrays{Undefined, None}
		end if
		declare new_idx : unknown := Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  + count{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		message("Adding factory preset: " & ", " & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, 0){Builtin, None, fs_get_filename}){Builtin, None, message}
		preset_title_array[new_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, 0){Builtin, None, fs_get_filename}
		file_name_array[new_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset_title_array[new_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		preset_info[new_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.ICON_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} 
		preset_tags0[new_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		preset_tags1[new_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		preset_info[new_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.ICON_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		preset_numbers_array[new_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := self{unknown} {no declaration} .validate_preset_id(preset.array[preset.ID_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		inc(count{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end if
		declare path : string := dev_keys.get_preset_path(user{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, dev_keys.get_preset_path} {Reuses: 0}
		save_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , path{unknown} {no declaration}  & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, 0){Builtin, None, fs_get_filename} & ".nka"){Builtin, None, save_array_str}
		else
		if(preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  < PRESET_VERSION{unknown} {no declaration} )
		end if
		end if
		fs_navigate(get_ui_id(file_browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, 1){Builtin, None, fs_navigate}
		else
		if(user{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
		Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := count{unknown} {no declaration} 
		message("self.num_user_presets: " & Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .load_user_presets(user_preset_titles{unknown} {no declaration} , user_preset_tags0{unknown} {no declaration} , user_preset_tags1{unknown} {no declaration} , user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , user_preset_info{unknown} {no declaration} , user_deleted_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		message("self.num_user_presets: " & Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .export_user_arrays{Undefined, None}
		message("self.num_user_presets: " & Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		else
		Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  + count{unknown} {no declaration} 
		message("Number of factory presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .load_presets(preset_title_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset_tags0{unknown} {no declaration} , preset_tags1{unknown} {no declaration} , preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset_info{unknown} {no declaration} , file_name_array{unknown} {no declaration} , favorite_presets_array{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .export_preset_arrays{Undefined, None}
		end if
		for _ : unknown, ks : unknown in pairs(keyswitch_preset[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , *]{unknown} {no declaration} )
		if(ks{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil)
		ks{unknown} {no declaration}  := self{unknown} {no declaration} .find_preset(ks.id{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		end if
		end for
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .export_favorite_array{Undefined, None}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .update_user_preset_situation{Undefined, None}
		if(search[Browser::presets{unknown} {no declaration} , Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration} ] = - 1)
		Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::presets[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		end if
		Browser::current_state{unknown} {no declaration}  := browser_state.NONE{unknown} {no declaration} 
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .filter_presets{Undefined, None}
		end if
	end function

	function Browser::delete_instrument_from_arrays(self : Browser)
		declare idx : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .instruments{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}

struct Bitlist
declare self{Ptr} : Bitlist {Reuses: 0}
declare Bitlist::val : int {Reuses: 0}

	function Bitlist::__init__
		Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end function

	function Bitlist::load(self : Bitlist, val : int)
		Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  := val{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end function

	function Bitlist::size(self : Bitlist)
		return (32)
	end function

	function Bitlist::search(self : Bitlist)
		return (ge(Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, ge} * ((31 - int(log(real(max(1, 2147483647 .and. Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, log} / log(2){Builtin, None, log}){Builtin, None, int}) + (eq(Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq} * - 32)))
	end function

	function Bitlist::clear(self : Bitlist)
		Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end function

	function Bitlist::set_all(self : Bitlist)
		Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  := -1
	end function

	function Bitlist::control_to_bitlist(self : Bitlist, ui_array : int[])

	function Bitlist::set(self : Bitlist, idx : int, val : int)
		Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  := .not. (.not. ((Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. .not. ((Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. (- val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}))) .and. .not. ((- val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. .not. ((Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. (- val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}))))
	end function

	function Bitlist::set_range(self : Bitlist, start_idx : int, end_idx : int, val : int)
		Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  := (eq(val{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){UserDefined, None, eq} * ((eq(end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 32){UserDefined, None, eq} * sh_right(- 1, 32){Builtin, None, sh_right}) + (Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. sh_left(.not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}, 32 - end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}))) + (eq(val{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq} * (lt(end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 32){UserDefined, None, lt} * (Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(.not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}, 32 - end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})))
	end function

	function Bitlist::get(self : Bitlist, idx : int)
		return (sh_right(Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration} , 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 1)
	end function

	function Bitlist::get_range(self : Bitlist, start_idx : int, end_idx : int)
		return ((eq(end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 32){UserDefined, None, eq} * Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration} ) + sh_left(sh_right(Bitlist::val{unknown} {no declaration} , 32 - end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. .not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}, 32 - end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})
	end function

	function Bitlist::reverse(self : Bitlist)
		for i : unknown in range(0, (32 / 2) + 1, 1)
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .swap(i{unknown} {no declaration} , 31 - i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		end for
	end function

	function Bitlist::swap(self : Bitlist, idx1 : int, idx2 : int)
		declare val_idx1 : int := self{unknown} {no declaration} .get(idx1{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		declare val_idx2 : int := self{unknown} {no declaration} .get(idx2{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .set(idx1{unknown} {no declaration} , val_idx2{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .set(idx2{unknown} {no declaration} , val_idx1{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	end function

	function Bitlist::print(self : Bitlist)
		declare bl : string := "[" {Reuses: 0}
		for i : unknown in range(0, 32, 1)
		bl{unknown} {no declaration}  := bl{unknown} {no declaration}  & self{unknown} {no declaration} .get(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}

		end for
		bl{unknown} {no declaration}  := bl{unknown} {no declaration}  & "]"
		message(bl{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	end function

	function Bitlist::__repr__(self{Ptr} : Bitlist)

	end function

end struct

struct Floatmask

	function Floatmask::print(self : Floatmask)

	function Floatmask::sh_left(self : Floatmask, pos : int)
		if(pos{unknown} {no declaration}  < 32)
		Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := sh_left(Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left} .or. sh_right_safe(Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , 32 - pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, sh_right_safe}

		else
		Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := sh_left(Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , pos{unknown} {no declaration}  - 32){Builtin, None, sh_left}
		Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		end if
	end function

	function Floatmask::sh_right(self : Floatmask, pos : int)
		if(pos{unknown} {no declaration}  < 32)
		Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := sh_right_safe(Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, sh_right_safe} .or. sh_left(Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , 32 - pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}
		Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := sh_right_safe(Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, sh_right_safe}
		else

		Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		end if
	end function

	function Floatmask::__and__(self : Floatmask, other : Floatmask)
		declare ret : unknown := Floatmask{Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		ret.fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. other.fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}

	function Floatmask::__or__(self : Floatmask, other : Floatmask)
		declare ret : unknown := Floatmask{Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}

		ret.fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. other.fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		return (ret{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end function

	function Floatmask::__invert__(self : Floatmask)
		declare ret : unknown := Floatmask{Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		ret.fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := .not. Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		ret.fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  := .not. Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		return (ret{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end function

	function Floatmask::__eq__(self : Floatmask, other : Floatmask)
		return (eq(((Floatmask::fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration}  - other.fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} ) + Floatmask::fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} ) - other.fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq})
	end function

	function Floatmask::empty(self : Floatmask)

	end function

struct Preset
declare self{Ptr} : Preset {Reuses: 0}
declare Preset::id : int {Reuses: 0}
declare Preset::name : string {Reuses: 0}
declare Preset::tags : Floatmask {Reuses: 0}
declare Preset::icon : int {Reuses: 0}
declare Preset::file : string {Reuses: 0}
declare Preset::deleted : int {Reuses: 0}

	function Preset::__init__(id : int, name : string, tags : Floatmask, icon : int, file : string, deleted : int)
		Preset::id{unknown} {no declaration}  := id{unknown} {no declaration} 
		Preset::name{unknown} {no declaration}  := name{unknown} {no declaration} 
		if(tags{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil)
		Preset::tags{unknown} {no declaration}  := Floatmask::__init__{Constructor, None, Floatmask::__init__}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .copy(tags{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		else
		Preset::tags{unknown} {no declaration}  := Floatmask::__init__{Constructor, None, Floatmask::__init__}
		end if
		Preset::icon{unknown} {no declaration}  := icon{unknown} {no declaration} 
		Preset::file{unknown} {no declaration}  := file{unknown} {no declaration} 
		Preset::deleted{unknown} {no declaration}  := deleted{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end function

	function Preset::set_favorite(self : Preset, val : int)
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .set(17 - 1, val{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	end function

	function Preset::is_favorite(self : Preset)
		return (self{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .get(17 - 1){Undefined, None})
	end function

	function Preset::copy(self : Preset, other : Preset)
		if(other{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil)
		Preset::id{unknown} {no declaration}  := other.id{unknown} {no declaration} 
		Preset::name{unknown} {no declaration}  := other.name{unknown} {no declaration} 
		if(Preset::tags{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil)
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .copy(other.tags{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		else
		Preset::tags{unknown} {no declaration}  := Floatmask::__init__{Constructor, None, Floatmask::__init__}
		end if
		Preset::icon{unknown} {no declaration}  := other.icon{unknown} {no declaration} 
		Preset::file{unknown} {no declaration}  := other.file{unknown} {no declaration} 
		Preset::deleted{unknown} {no declaration}  := other.deleted{unknown} {no declaration} 
		end if
	end function

	function Preset::write(self : Preset, array : int[])
		array[preset.VERSION_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := PRESET_VERSION{unknown} {no declaration} 
		array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Preset::deleted{unknown} {no declaration} 
		array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := self{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := self{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		array[preset.ID_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Preset::id{unknown} {no declaration} 
		array[preset.NUM_TAGS_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 17
	end function

	function Preset::__repr__(self{Ptr} : Preset)
		return ("<Preset> Object: " & self{Ptr}{Preset} {self} )
	end function

end struct

struct Categories
declare self{Ptr} : Categories {Reuses: 0}
declare Categories::tags : Floatmask {Reuses: 0}
declare Categories::tagmask : Floatmask {Reuses: 0}
declare Categories::tag_names[17] : string[] {Reuses: 0}

declare Categories::elements[5] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
declare Categories::active[5] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
declare Categories::filtermethod[5] : int[] := [filter.SUBTRACTIVE{unknown} {no declaration} , filter.TOGGLE{unknown} {no declaration} , filter.SUBTRACTIVE{unknown} {no declaration} , filter.SUBTRACTIVE{unknown} {no declaration} , filter.SUBTRACTIVE{unknown} {no declaration} ] {Reuses: 0}

declare Categories::ensemble_tag : int := 17 - 2 {Reuses: 0}

	function Categories::__init__(tag_names : string[], names : string[], elements : int[])

		Categories::elements{unknown} {no declaration}  := elements{unknown} {no declaration} 
		Categories::names{unknown} {no declaration}  := names{unknown} {no declaration} 
		array.cumsum(Categories::elements{unknown} {no declaration} , Categories::accum{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, array.cumsum}
		array.insert(Categories::accum{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 0){UserDefined, None, array.insert}
	end function

	function Categories::update_tags(self : Categories, control_array : int[])

	end function

	function Categories::clear_tags(self : Categories, control_array : int[])

	end function

	function Categories::update_active_tags(self : Categories)
		for cat : unknown in range(0, 5, 1)
		Categories::active[cat{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := self{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .get_range(Categories::accum[cat{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , Categories::accum[cat{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}.count(1){Undefined, None}
		end for
	end function

	function Categories::get_tags_until(self : Categories, idx : int)
		return (Categories::accum[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end function

	function Categories::set_instrument_tags(self : Categories, instrument_idx : int)

		self{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .set(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + instrument_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Undefined, None}
	end function

	function Categories::set_ensemble_tag(self : Categories, val : bool)

	end function

	function Categories::get_tag_category(self : Categories, tag_idx : int)
		for i : unknown, val : unknown in pairs(Categories::accum{unknown} {no declaration} )
		if((tag_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  >= val{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (tag_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  < Categories::accum[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} ))

		end if
		end for
		return (- 1)
	end function

	function Categories::__repr__(self{Ptr} : Categories)

	end function

end struct

	function Browser::filter_presets(self : Browser)
		Browser::filtered_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := [nil]
		message("Filtering presets..."){Builtin, None, message}
		declare allowed : int {Reuses: 0}
		declare z : int {Reuses: 0}
		for i : unknown in range(0, Browser::num_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
		declare preset : Floatmask := Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		for v : unknown in range(0, 5, 1)
		declare current_filtermethod : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .filtermethod[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		if(current_filtermethod{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.ADDITIVE{unknown} {no declaration} )
		preset{unknown} {no declaration}  := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. preset.get_range(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(v{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}, self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(v{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Undefined, None}){Undefined, None}
		declare bit_count : int := preset.count(1){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		if((bit_count{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) or (self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .active[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
		allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  := allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  + self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .elements[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		else
		break
		end if
		else
		if((current_filtermethod{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.SUBTRACTIVE{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (current_filtermethod{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.TOGGLE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
		preset{unknown} {no declaration}  := .not. self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. preset{unknown} {no declaration} 
		declare bit_count : int := preset.get_range(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(v{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}, self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(v{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Undefined, None}){Undefined, None}.count(1){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  := allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  + bit_count{unknown} {no declaration} 
		end if
		end if
		end for
		if(allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  = 17)
		Browser::filtered_presets[z{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
		inc(z{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end if
		Browser::num_shown_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := z{unknown} {no declaration} 
		allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		end for
	end function

	function Browser::matches_all_categories_except(self : Browser, preset_tags : Floatmask, ignore_cat : int)
		for cat : unknown in range(0, 5, 1)
		if(cat{unknown} {no declaration}  = ignore_cat{unknown} {no declaration} )
		continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		end if
		declare b : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(cat{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		declare e : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(cat{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		if(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .active[cat{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
		continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		end if
		declare p_slice : unknown := preset_tags.get_range(b{unknown} {no declaration} , e{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		declare sel_slice : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .get_range(b{unknown} {no declaration} , e{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		declare merged : Floatmask := p_slice{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sel_slice{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		if(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .filtermethod[cat{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.ADDITIVE{unknown} {no declaration} )
		if(merged.count(1){Undefined, None} = 0)
		return (0)
		end if
		else
		if(merged.__eq__(sel_slice{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} = 0)
		return (0)
		end if
		end if
		end for
		return (1)
	end function

	function Browser::update_disabled_tags(self : Browser)
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tagmask{unknown} {no declaration} .clear{Undefined, None}
		for cat : unknown in range(0, 5, 1)
		declare cat_begin : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(cat{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		declare cat_end : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(cat{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		declare need : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .elements[cat{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		declare avail : unknown := Floatmask::__init__{Constructor, None, Floatmask::__init__} {Reuses: 0}
		avail.clear{Undefined, None}
		for i : unknown in range(0, Browser::num_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
		declare p : unknown := Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		if((p{unknown} {no declaration}  = nil) or (p.deleted{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1))
		continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		end if
		declare p_slice : unknown := p.tags.get_range(cat_begin{unknown} {no declaration} , cat_end{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		if(p_slice.count(1){Undefined, None} = 0)
		continue{Builtin, None, continue}
		end if
		if(self{unknown} {no declaration} .matches_all_categories_except(p.tags{unknown} {no declaration} , cat{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} = 1)
		avail{unknown} {no declaration}  := avail{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. p_slice{unknown} {no declaration} 
		if(avail.get_range(cat_begin{unknown} {no declaration} , cat_end{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}.count(1){Undefined, None} = need{unknown} {no declaration} )
		break
		end if
		end if
		end for
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tagmask{unknown} {no declaration} .set_range(cat_begin{unknown} {no declaration} , cat_end{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Undefined, None}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tagmask{unknown} {no declaration}  := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .tagmask{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. avail.get_range(cat_begin{unknown} {no declaration} , cat_end{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		end for
	end function

	function Browser::is_user_preset(self : Browser, preset : Preset)

		return (preset.tags.get(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .user_tag{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None})

	function Browser::save_options(self : Browser, title : string, control_array : int[], user_preset : int)

		declare path : string := dev_keys.get_preset_path(user_preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, dev_keys.get_preset_path} {Reuses: 0}
		declare idx : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .get_tags_until(self{unknown} {no declaration} .categories{unknown} {no declaration} .instruments{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		new_preset.tags.set(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + get_currently_opened_instrument_idx{UserDefined, None, get_currently_opened_instrument_idx}, 1){Undefined, None}
		declare compatible : int := articulation_compatible_with_ensemble(selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_compatible_with_ensemble} {Reuses: 0}

		message("current tags"){Builtin, None, message}

		new_preset.tags.print{Undefined, None}
		if((Browser::current_save_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  = save_mode.EDIT_TAGS{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (user_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .delete_preset(Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		end if

		end if
		end if
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .export_favorite_array{Undefined, None}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .update_user_preset_situation{Undefined, None}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .filter_presets{Undefined, None}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .load_preset(Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}

	end function

	function Browser::find_preset(self : Browser, preset_id : int)
		for i : unknown in range(0, Browser::num_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
		if(Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .id{unknown} {no declaration}  = preset_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
		return (Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
		end if
		end for
		return (nil)
	end function

	function Browser::save_preset(self : Browser, new_preset : Preset, path : string)
		declare exists : int := self{unknown} {no declaration} .preset_exists(new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka", path{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		if(self{unknown} {no declaration} .is_user_preset(new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} = 1)
		if((exists{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1))
		for user_p : unknown in Browser::user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} 
		if(user_p.id{unknown} {no declaration}  = preset.array[preset.ID_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
		user_p.copy(new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		user_p.deleted{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		break
		end if
		end for
		else
		Browser::user_presets[Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} 
		inc(Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		declare new_id : int := self{unknown} {no declaration} .validate_preset_id(10000, user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		new_preset.id{unknown} {no declaration}  := new_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
		message("New user preset added to user presets array: " & ", " & new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " with id: " & ", " & new_preset.id{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .export_user_arrays{Undefined, None}
		end if
		else
		if((exists{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1))
		for p : unknown in Browser::presets{unknown} {no declaration} 
		if(p.id{unknown} {no declaration}  = preset.array[preset.ID_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
		p.copy(new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		p.deleted{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		new_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  := p{unknown} {no declaration} 
		break
		end if
		end for
		else
		message("Adding new preset to presets array" & ", " & new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		message("Number of factory presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " Number of user presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		new_preset.id{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration} 
		Browser::presets[Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} 
		inc(Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		message("New preset added to presets array: " & ", " & new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " with idx: " & ", " & new_preset.id{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		message("Number of factory presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " Number of user presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		end if
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .export_preset_arrays{Undefined, None}
		end if
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .update_user_preset_situation{Undefined, None}
		new_preset.write(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		PresetBrowser.save_preset_array(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.save_preset_array}
		wait_async(save_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , path{unknown} {no declaration}  & new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, save_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
		Browser::last{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration} 
		Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration}  := new_preset{unknown} {no declaration} 
		message("Preset saved: " & ", " & new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " with idx: " & ", " & new_preset.id{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " in path: " & ", " & path{unknown} {no declaration}  & new_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka" & ", " & " with tags: " & ", " & new_preset.tags{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	end function

	function Browser::delete_preset(self : Browser, preset : Preset)

		dec(Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}

	end function

	function Browser::validate_preset_id(self : Browser, idx : int, validation_array : int[])
		declare preset_exists : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
		if(search[validation_array{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1)
		declare count : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
		preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
		while(preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) 
		if(search[validation_array{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + count{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1)
		inc(count{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		else
		preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		end if
		end while
		return (count{unknown} {no declaration}  + idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
		end if
		return (idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end function

	function Browser::load_preset(self : Browser, preset : Preset)
		if((Browser::is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil))
		Browser::is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
		if(Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration}  # Browser::last{unknown} {no declaration} )
		Browser::last{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::current{unknown} {no declaration} 
		declare path : string := dev_keys.get_preset_path(self{unknown} {no declaration} .is_user_preset(preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}){UserDefined, None, dev_keys.get_preset_path} {Reuses: 0}
		message("Loading preset from: " & path{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		declare preset_exists : unknown := self{unknown} {no declaration} .preset_exists(preset.name{unknown} {no declaration} , path{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
		message("Preset exists: " & preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		if(preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
		message("Preset not found: " & ", " & path{unknown} {no declaration}  & preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, message}
		else
		PresetBrowser.load_preset_array(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.load_preset_array}
		end if
		end if
		Browser::is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
		end if
	end function

	function Browser::preset_exists(self : Browser, file_name : string, path : string)

		if((preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1))
		return (1)
		else
		return (0)
		end if
	end function

	function Browser::update_user_preset_situation(self : Browser)

		end for
		for i : unknown in range(0, Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
		declare preset : Preset := Browser::user_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		message(preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		if((preset{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil) and (preset.deleted{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
		Browser::presets[Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset{unknown} {no declaration}

		end if
		end for
		end if
		Browser::num_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  + Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} 
		message("Number of presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " Number of user presets: " & ", " & Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	end function

	function Browser::delete_instrument_from_arrays(self : Browser)

		for i : unknown in range(0, Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
		declare preset : Preset := Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}

		preset_title_array[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.name{unknown} {no declaration} 
		file_name_array[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.name{unknown} {no declaration} 
		preset_info[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.icon{unknown} {no declaration} 
		preset_tags0[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.tags.fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		preset_tags1[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.tags.fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		preset_numbers_array[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.id{unknown} {no declaration} 
		inc(ii{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end if
		end for
		for i : unknown in range(ii{unknown} {no declaration} , Browser::num_factory_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
		preset_title_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ""
		file_name_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ""

		preset_numbers_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
