	end function

	function Browser::load_arrays(self : Browser)
		load_array(favorite_presets_array{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, load_array}
		load_array(user_preset_tags0{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, load_array}
		declare ___print_string : string := "user_preset_tags0[" & num_elements[user_preset_tags0{unknown} {no declaration} ] & "]: " {Reuses: 0}
		for i : unknown in range(0, num_elements[user_preset_tags0{unknown} {no declaration} ], 1)
		___print_string{unknown} {no declaration}  := ___print_string{unknown} {no declaration}  & user_preset_tags0[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", "
		end for
		message(___print_string{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		load_array(user_preset_tags1{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, load_array}
		load_array(user_preset_titles{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, load_array}
		load_array(user_deleted_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, load_array}
		load_array(user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, load_array}
		load_array(user_preset_info{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, load_array}
		declare nka_path : string := resources_path{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
		if(eq(development[0]{unknown} {no declaration} , 22714){UserDefined, None, eq} = 1)
		nka_path{unknown} {no declaration}  := data_path{unknown} {no declaration} 
		end if
		load_array_str(tag_names_array{unknown} {no declaration} , nka_path{unknown} {no declaration}  & "tag_names_array" & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}

		file_name_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .file{unknown} {no declaration} 
		end for

	function Browser::export_user_arrays(self : Browser)
		message("EXPORTING USER ARRAYS"){Builtin, None, message}
		self{unknown} {no declaration} .clear_user_arrays(Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , MAX_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
		for i : unknown in range(0, Browser::num_user_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
		user_preset_tags0[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::user_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .fm[0]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		user_preset_tags1[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::user_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .tags{unknown} {no declaration} .fm[1]{unknown} {no declaration} .val{unknown} {no declaration} 
		user_preset_titles[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::user_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .name{unknown} {no declaration} 
		user_deleted_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::user_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .deleted{unknown} {no declaration} 
		user_preset_numbers[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::user_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .id{unknown} {no declaration} 
		user_preset_info[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := Browser::user_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .icon{unknown} {no declaration} 
		end for
		declare ___print_string : string := "user_preset_titles[" & num_elements[user_preset_titles{unknown} {no declaration} ] & "]: " {Reuses: 0}
		for i : unknown in range(0, num_elements[user_preset_titles{unknown} {no declaration} ], 1)
		___print_string{unknown} {no declaration}  := ___print_string{unknown} {no declaration}  & user_preset_titles[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", "
		end for
		message(___print_string{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
		wait_async(save_array(user_preset_tags0{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, save_array}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
		wait_async(save_array(user_preset_tags1{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, save_array}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
		wait_async(save_array(user_preset_titles{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, save_array}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
		wait_async(save_array(user_deleted_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, save_array}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
		wait_async(save_array(user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, save_array}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
		wait_async(save_array(user_preset_info{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, save_array}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
	end function

	function Browser::export_favorite_array(self : Browser)
		for i : unknown in range(0, Browser::num_presets{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)

		end for

	end function

	function Browser::__repr__(self{Ptr} : Browser)
		return ("<Browser> Object: " & self{Ptr}{Browser} {self} )
	end function

on ui_control(xy_center_circles{unknown} {no declaration} )
cc_cb_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
declare angle : real {Reuses: 0}
declare value : int {Reuses: 0}
declare distance : real {Reuses: 0}
if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN{unknown} {no declaration} )
distance{unknown} {no declaration}  := center_circle_distance(xy_center_circles[0]{unknown} {no declaration} , xy_center_circles[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, center_circle_distance}
angle{unknown} {no declaration}  := center_circle_angle(xy_center_circles[0]{unknown} {no declaration} , xy_center_circles[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, center_circle_angle}
value{unknown} {no declaration}  := clamp(angle_to_value(angle{unknown} {no declaration} , 0.7, (NI_MATH_PI{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 0.7){UserDefined, None, angle_to_value}, 0, 127){UserDefined, None, clamp}
if((distance{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0.14) and (distance{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0.175))
selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
else
if((distance{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0.175) and (distance{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0.21))
selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
else
if((distance{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0.21) and (distance{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0.242))
selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
else
if((distance{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0.242) and (distance{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0.29))
selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
else
selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
end if
end if
end if
end if
if(selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
if(abs(value{unknown} {no declaration}  - loaded_subarticulations_start[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} < 10)
selected_circle_end{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
else
if(abs(value{unknown} {no declaration}  - loaded_subarticulations_end[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} < 10)
selected_circle_end{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
else
selected_circle_end{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
end if
end if
else
selected_circle_end{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
end if
call update_subarticulation_selection{UserDefined, None, update_subarticulation_selection}
end if
if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG{unknown} {no declaration} )
wait(10000){Builtin, None, wait}
if((cc_cb_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (selected_circle_end{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
angle{unknown} {no declaration}  := center_circle_angle(xy_center_circles[0]{unknown} {no declaration} , xy_center_circles[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, center_circle_angle}
value{unknown} {no declaration}  := clamp(angle_to_value(angle{unknown} {no declaration} , 0.7, (NI_MATH_PI{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 0.7){UserDefined, None, angle_to_value}, 0, 127){UserDefined, None, clamp}
if(selected_circle_end{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
if(value{unknown} {no declaration}  < ((loaded_subarticulations_end[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) - loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ))
loaded_subarticulations_start[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := value{unknown} {no declaration} 
end if
else
if(selected_circle_end{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
if(value{unknown} {no declaration}  > ((loaded_subarticulations_start[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) + loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ))
loaded_subarticulations_end[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := value{unknown} {no declaration} 
end if
end if
end if
call update_range_assignment_control{UserDefined, None, update_range_assignment_control}
call update_range_assignment_circles{UserDefined, None, update_range_assignment_circles}
end if
end if
end on

function sh_right_safe(val : int, pos : int)
	return ((sh_right(val{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. (1 * sh_left(1, 31 - pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})) .or. sh_right(val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. 2147483647, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function is_in_range(val : int, a : int, b : int)
	return (1 + (sh_right(b{unknown} {no declaration}  - val{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(val{unknown} {no declaration}  - a{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function swap(a : int, b : int)
	a{unknown} {no declaration}  := a{unknown} {no declaration}  .xor. b{unknown} {no declaration} 
	b{unknown} {no declaration}  := b{unknown} {no declaration}  .xor. a{unknown} {no declaration} 
	a{unknown} {no declaration}  := a{unknown} {no declaration}  .xor. b{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function gt(a : int, b : int)
	return (- sh_right(b{unknown} {no declaration}  - a{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function ge(a : int, b : int)
	return (sh_right(a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} + 1)
end function

function eq(a : int, b : int)
	return (- sh_right(abs(a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function lt(a : int, b : int)
	return (- sh_right(a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function le(a : int, b : int)
	return (1 + sh_right(b{unknown} {no declaration}  - a{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function ne(x : int)
	return (abs(sh_right(abs(x{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}){Builtin, None, abs})
end function

function neg(x : int)
	return (- sh_right(x{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function bool(x : int)
	return (1 + sh_right(abs(x{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function sign(x : int)
	return (sh_right(x{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. 1)
end function

function sign3(x : int)
	return (sign(x{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, sign} .and. - bool(x{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, bool})
end function

function scale_range(input : number, currentMin : number, currentMax : number, scaleToMin : number, scaleToMax : number)
	return ((((input{unknown} {no declaration}  - currentMin{unknown} {no declaration} ) * (scaleToMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) / (currentMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - currentMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) + scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function scale_range_real(input : real, currentMin : real, currentMax : real, scaleToMin : real, scaleToMax : real)
	return (int((((real(input{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} - currentMin{unknown} {no declaration} ) * (scaleToMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) / (currentMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - currentMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) + scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int})
end function

function scale_range_slider(input : real, scaleToMin : real, scaleToMax : real)
	return (int(((input{unknown} {no declaration}  * (scaleToMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) / 1e+06) + scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int})
end function

function scale_slider(input : int, scaleToMin : real, scaleToMax : real)
	return (int(((real(input{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} * (scaleToMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) / 1e+06) + scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int})
end function

function scale_range_log(input : real, currentMin : real, currentMax : real, scaleToMin : real, scaleToMax : real)
	return (pow(10, (log(scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, log} / log(10){Builtin, None, log}) + (((input{unknown} {no declaration}  - currentMin{unknown} {no declaration} ) / (currentMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - currentMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) * ((log(scaleToMax{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, log} / log(10){Builtin, None, log}) - (log(scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, log} / log(10){Builtin, None, log})))){Builtin, None, pow})
end function

function scale_clamp_to(input : int, fromMin : int, fromMax : int, toMin : int, toMax : int)
	return (int(scale_range(real(((input{unknown} {no declaration}  * (1 + (sh_right(fromMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - input{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(input{unknown} {no declaration}  - fromMin{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) - (fromMin{unknown} {no declaration}  * sh_right(input{unknown} {no declaration}  - fromMin{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})) - (fromMax{unknown} {no declaration}  * sh_right(fromMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - input{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})){Builtin, None, real}, real(fromMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}, real(fromMax{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}, real(toMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}, real(toMax{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}){UserDefined, None, scale_range}){Builtin, None, int})
end function

function is_bit_set(x : int, pos : int)
	return (sh_right(x{unknown} {no declaration} , pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 1)
end function

function set_bit(x : int, pos : int)
	return (x{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})
end function

function clear_bit(x : int, pos : int)
	return (x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})
end function

function flip_bit(x : int, pos : int)
	return (.not. (.not. (x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. (x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})) .and. .not. (sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left} .and. .not. (x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}))))
end function

function modify_bit(x : int, pos : int, state : int)
	return (.not. (.not. ((x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. .not. ((x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. (- state{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}))) .and. .not. ((- state{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. .not. ((x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. (- state{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})))))
end function

function decimal_to_binary(input : int, output_array : int[])
	for lib.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[output_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 2
	output_array[(num_elements[output_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 2) - lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := abs(sh_right(- (input{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}), 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}){Builtin, None, abs}
	end for
end function

function binary_to_decimal(length : int, input_array : int[])
	declare result : int {Reuses: 0}
	for lib.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to length{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := result{unknown} {no declaration}  + (input_array[(length{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * int(pow(2, real(lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, pow}){Builtin, None, int})
	end for
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function clamp(x : int, min : int, max : int)
	return (((x{unknown} {no declaration}  * is_in_range(x{unknown} {no declaration} , min{unknown} {no declaration} , max{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, is_in_range}) - (min{unknown} {no declaration}  * sh_right(x{unknown} {no declaration}  - min{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})) - (max{unknown} {no declaration}  * sh_right(max{unknown} {no declaration}  - x{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function clamp_slider(x : int)
	return ((x{unknown} {no declaration}  * is_in_range(x{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 1000000){UserDefined, None, is_in_range}) - (1000000 * sh_right(1000000 - x{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function clip(x : int, top : int)
	return ((x{unknown} {no declaration}  * is_in_range(x{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, top{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, is_in_range}) - (top{unknown} {no declaration}  * sh_right(top{unknown} {no declaration}  - x{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function max(a : int, b : int)
	return (a{unknown} {no declaration}  - ((a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} ) .and. sh_right(a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function max4(a : int, b : int, c : int, d : int)
	return (max(a{unknown} {no declaration} , b{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max} - ((max(a{unknown} {no declaration} , b{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max} - max(c{unknown} {no declaration} , d{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}) .and. sh_right(max(a{unknown} {no declaration} , b{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max} - max(c{unknown} {no declaration} , d{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function min(a : int, b : int)

	return (a{unknown} {no declaration}  - (floor(a{unknown} {no declaration}  / b{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * b{unknown} {no declaration} ))

function non_rpt_random(ref last_random : int, min_random : int, max_random : int)

	last_random{unknown} {no declaration}  := result{unknown} {no declaration} 
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

	return (((sh_right(___M.Seed{unknown} {no declaration} , 8){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 16777215) mod ((max{unknown} {no declaration}  - min{unknown} {no declaration} ) + 1)) + min{unknown} {no declaration} )

function note_to_string(instrument : int, note : int)
	declare reduced_note : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare string : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	reduced_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := (note{unknown} {no declaration}  - instrument_lowest_string[loaded_instrument_types[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) - mnu_finger_position{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(reduced_note{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	string{unknown} {no declaration}  := reduced_note{unknown} {no declaration}  / instrument_string_interval[loaded_instrument_types[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	string{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	string{unknown} {no declaration}  := min(string{unknown} {no declaration} , instrument_number_of_strings[loaded_instrument_types[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){UserDefined, None, min}
	return (string{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

	end for

function update_instrument_range(instrument : int)
	declare lowest : int := 128 {Reuses: 0}
	declare highest : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare ks : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare s : int {Reuses: 0}
	for ks{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 24 - 1
	if(keyswitch_states[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if((subarticulations_range_lower[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (subarticulations_octave_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)) < lowest{unknown} {no declaration} )
	lowest{unknown} {no declaration}  := subarticulations_range_lower[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (subarticulations_octave_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	end if
	if((subarticulations_range_upper[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (subarticulations_octave_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)) > highest{unknown} {no declaration} )
	highest{unknown} {no declaration}  := subarticulations_range_upper[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (subarticulations_octave_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end for
	instrument_range[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := (lowest{unknown} {no declaration}  - range_offset_lower{unknown} {no declaration} ) - (octave_shift[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	instrument_range[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := (highest{unknown} {no declaration}  + range_offset_upper{unknown} {no declaration} ) - (octave_shift[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
end function

function update_all_ranges
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare lowest : int := 128 {Reuses: 0}
	declare highest : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 1 - 1
	update_instrument_range(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, update_instrument_range}
	lowest{unknown} {no declaration}  := min(lowest{unknown} {no declaration} , instrument_range[i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min}
	highest{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(highest{unknown} {no declaration} , instrument_range[i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}
	end for
	nki_range[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(lowest{unknown} {no declaration} , (keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) + 8){UserDefined, None, max}
	nki_range[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := highest{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call set_key_colors{UserDefined, None, set_key_colors}
end function

function gather_keyswitch_sets
	for i : unknown in range(0, NUM_KEYSWITCH_SETS{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
	declare path : string {Reuses: 0}
	if(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration}  = NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	path{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_sets_path{unknown} {no declaration}  & "Ensemble Articulation Sets/" & keyswitch_set_names[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"
	else
	path{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_sets_path{unknown} {no declaration}  & get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_name{UserDefined, None, get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_name} & " Articulation Sets/" & keyswitch_set_names[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"
	end if
	load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(_keyswitch_set_array{unknown} {no declaration} , path{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
	wait_async(load_array_str(_keyswitch_set_array{unknown} {no declaration} , path{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, load_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
	message(path{unknown} {no declaration}  & " returned load ID " & load_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	if(load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	for ii : unknown in range(0, num_elements[_keyswitch_set_array{unknown} {no declaration} ], 1)
	_keyswitch_set_nkas[(i{unknown} {no declaration}  * num_elements[_keyswitch_set_array{unknown} {no declaration} ]) + ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := _keyswitch_set_array[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	found_keyswitch_sets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
end function

function load_keyswitch_set(set_id : int, ks_page : int)
	declare selected_instrument_before : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare selected_keyswitch_before : int {Reuses: 0}
	selected_instrument_before{unknown} {no declaration}  := selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} 
	selected_keyswitch_before{unknown} {no declaration}  := selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(set_id{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	mnu_keyswitch_set{unknown} {no declaration}  := set_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	keyswitch_set_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS{unknown} {no declaration} , TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	for inst : unknown in range(0, 1, 1)
	for ks : unknown in range(0, 24, 1)
	keyswitch_states[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	for ks : unknown in range(ks_page{unknown} {no declaration}  * 8, (ks_page{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) * 8, 1)
	keyswitch_states[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	keyswitch_purge_states[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	articulation_names[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := "Missing .nka file"
	selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration}  := inst{unknown} {no declaration} 
	selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration}  := ks{unknown} {no declaration} 
	preset.array{unknown} {no declaration}  := [0]
	preset.array_buffer{unknown} {no declaration}  := [0]
	declare nka_name : string := keyswitch_set_nkas[set_id{unknown} {no declaration} , inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if(set_id{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	nka_name{unknown} {no declaration}  := "Empty"
	end if
	declare load_id : unknown := load_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , dev_keys.get_preset_path_by_inst_type(loaded_instrument_types[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, dev_keys.get_preset_path_by_inst_type} & nka_name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str} {Reuses: 0}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , dev_keys.get_preset_path_by_inst_type(loaded_instrument_types[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, dev_keys.get_preset_path_by_inst_type} & nka_name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
	if(not array_equal(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.array_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, array_equal})
	PresetBrowser.load_preset_array(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.load_preset_array}
	articulation_names[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := nka_name{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	keyswitch_states[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	if((pnl_dialog{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (current_dialog_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  = DIALOG_MODE_UNMAPPED_SUBARTICULATION{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	btn_dialog_confirm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	keyswitch_set_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration}  := selected_instrument_before{unknown} {no declaration} 
	selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	btn_keyswitch_dc{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	PresetBrowser.update_view{UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.update_view}
	update_keyswitch_selection{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_selection}
	if(set_id{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	selected_keyswitch_set{unknown} {no declaration}  := set_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	update_keyswitch_set_selection{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_set_selection}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS{unknown} {no declaration} , ne(btn_mixer_rev_title{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	call nks.update_labels{UserDefined, None, nks.update_labels}
	update_purge{UserDefined, None, update_purge}
end function

function subarticulation_event_get_free_index
	declare idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare result : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while((idx{unknown} {no declaration}  < MAX_SUBARTICULATION_EVENTS{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (idx{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)) 
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[subarticulation_event_list{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, idx{unknown} {no declaration} , MAX_SUBARTICULATION_EVENTS{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if(subarticulation_event_last_used[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - lookahead{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := MAX_SUBARTICULATION_EVENTS{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	end while
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function subarticulation_event_fade_out(subarticulation_event_id : int, fade_time : int, stop_voice : int)
	if(subarticulation_event_is_event_active(subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_is_event_active} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	fade_out(subarticulation_event_get_event_id(subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_get_event_id}, fade_time{unknown} {no declaration}  * 1000, stop_voice{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, fade_out}
	if(subarticulation_octave_layer_is_event_active(subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_octave_layer_is_event_active} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	fade_out(subarticulation_octave_layer_get_event_id(subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_octave_layer_get_event_id}, fade_time{unknown} {no declaration}  * 1000, stop_voice{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, fade_out}
	end if
	if(subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	fade_out(subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , fade_time{unknown} {no declaration}  * 1000, stop_voice{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, fade_out}
	end if
	if(subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	fade_out(subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , fade_time{unknown} {no declaration}  * 1000, stop_voice{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, fade_out}
	end if
	if(stop_voice{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	subarticulation_event_set_event_id(subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_set_event_id}
	end if
	end if
end function

function subarticulation_group_count(subarticulation_id : int)
	declare group_count : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	if((subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_LEGATO{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_MURMATIONS{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	group_count{unknown} {no declaration}  := NUM_MIC_POSITIONS{unknown} {no declaration}  * ((subarticulations_dynamic_layers[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 3) + subarticulations_trans_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	else
	group_count{unknown} {no declaration}  := (NUM_MIC_POSITIONS{unknown} {no declaration}  * subarticulations_interval_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * ((subarticulations_rr_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * subarticulations_dynamic_layers[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * (1 + subarticulations_release_group[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	end if
	return (group_count{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function subarticulation_purge(subarticulation_id : int, purge_state : int)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to subarticulation_group_count(subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_group_count} - 1
	purge_group((subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ) + TITLE_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , purge_state{unknown} {no declaration}  * microphone_position_states[i{unknown} {no declaration}  mod NUM_MIC_POSITIONS{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, purge_group}
	end for
end function

function subarticulation_play_note(instrument : int, keyswitch : int, subarticulation_idx : int, articulation_event_id : int, subarticulation_id : int, note : int, velocity : int, interval : int, rr : int, modulation : int, level : int, transpose : int, octave_layer : int, previous_note : int)
	declare subarticulation_event_id : int := subarticulation_event_get_free_index{UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_get_free_index} {Reuses: 0}
	declare note_event : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare octave_event : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	if(articulation_mw_to_velocity[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	modulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := int((1e+06 * (real(loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} + ((real(velocity{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * real(loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}))) / 127){Builtin, None, int}
	level{unknown} {no declaration}  := int(((real(velocity{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * 1e+06) * articulations_compute_fade_level(instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , velocity{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulations_compute_fade_level}){Builtin, None, int}
	end if
	declare velocity_after_dyn_range : unknown := int((127 * (real(loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} + ((real(velocity{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * real(loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}))) / 127){Builtin, None, int} {Reuses: 0}
	declare transition_note_event : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare transition_octave_event : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare modulation_in_127 : int := int((real(modulation{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 1e+06) * 127){Builtin, None, int} {Reuses: 0}
	if(subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_RUNS_OVERLAY{unknown} {no declaration} )
	velocity_after_dyn_range{unknown} {no declaration}  := modulation_in_127{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_INTERVAL_LONG{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if((subarticulations_interval_selection[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (interval{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0))
	interval{unknown} {no declaration}  := interval{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	end if
	end if
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare ii : int {Reuses: 0}
	if((subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1) and (subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
	if(((((subarticulations_solo_states_any_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (subarticulations_solo_states[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (subarticulations_mute_states[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )) and ((global_fade_in[note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel(subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ))) and (subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0))
	if((subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_LEGATO{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_MURMATIONS{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if(articulation_event_subarticulation_inactive[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = false)
	inc(articulation_subarticulation_is_playing[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}

	cut_off_attack{unknown} {no declaration}  := le(ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - last_released[note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 500){UserDefined, None, le}

	end if
	end if
	end if

	subarticulation_event_actual_note[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := (note{unknown} {no declaration}  + transpose{unknown} {no declaration} ) - (subarticulations_octave_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)

	subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := transition_octave_event{unknown} {no declaration} 
	subarticulation_event_last_used[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} 
	subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	subarticulation_event_rr[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := rr{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else

	end if
	return (subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function subarticulation_note_off(subarticulation_event_id : int)
	if(subarticulation_event_is_event_active(subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_is_event_active} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	articulation_subarticulation_is_playing[articulation_event_instrument[subarticulation_event_articulation_event[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , articulation_event_keyswitch[subarticulation_event_articulation_event[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(0, articulation_subarticulation_is_playing[articulation_event_instrument[subarticulation_event_articulation_event[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , articulation_event_keyswitch[subarticulation_event_articulation_event[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){UserDefined, None, max}
	update_action_display_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_action_display_visibility}
	declare subarticulation_id : int := subarticulation_event_subarticulation[subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}

function subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel(subarticulation_id : int)
	declare result : unknown := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if(subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)

	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function subarticulation_set_envelope(subarticulation_id : int, param : int, value : int, release_flag : int)
	declare is_release_group_buffer : int {Reuses: 0}
	for i : unknown in range(TITLE_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_group_count(subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_group_count} + TITLE_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
	if(((i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) mod NUM_MIC_POSITIONS{unknown} {no declaration} ) = 0)
	is_release_group_buffer{unknown} {no declaration}  := is_release_group(subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, is_release_group}
	end if
	if(is_release_group_buffer{unknown} {no declaration}  = release_flag{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_group_env(subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} , param{unknown} {no declaration} , value{unknown} {no declaration} , release_flag{unknown} {no declaration}  * ne(eq(subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_ONESHOT{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}){UserDefined, None, ne}){UserDefined, None, set_group_env}
	end if
	end for
end function

function subarticulation_set_envelope_min(subarticulation_id : int, param : int, value : int, release_flag : int)
	declare is_release_group_buffer : int {Reuses: 0}
	for i : unknown in range(TITLE_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_group_count(subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_group_count} + TITLE_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
	if(((i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) mod NUM_MIC_POSITIONS{unknown} {no declaration} ) = 0)
	is_release_group_buffer{unknown} {no declaration}  := is_release_group(subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, is_release_group}
	end if
	if(is_release_group_buffer{unknown} {no declaration}  = release_flag{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_group_env(subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} , param{unknown} {no declaration} , max(get_group_env(subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} , param{unknown} {no declaration} , release_flag{unknown} {no declaration}  * ne(eq(subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_ONESHOT{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}){UserDefined, None, ne}){UserDefined, None, get_group_env}, value{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}, release_flag{unknown} {no declaration}  * ne(eq(subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_ONESHOT{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}){UserDefined, None, ne}){UserDefined, None, set_group_env}
	end if
	end for
end function

function set_group_env(group_id : unknown, engine_par : unknown, value : unknown, release_flag : unknown)
	declare release_mod_names : string[] := ["ENV_AHDSR", "ENV_AHDSR_RELEASE"] {Reuses: 0}
	declare mod_idx : unknown := get_mod_idx(group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , release_mod_names[release_flag{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_mod_idx} {Reuses: 0}
	declare tar_idx : unknown := get_target_idx(group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None, get_target_idx} {Reuses: 0}
	set_engine_par(engine_par{unknown} {no declaration} , value{unknown} {no declaration} , group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , tar_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
end function

function get_group_env(group_id : unknown, engine_par : unknown, release_flag : unknown)
	declare release_mod_names : string[] := ["ENV_AHDSR", "ENV_AHDSR_RELEASE"] {Reuses: 0}
	declare mod_idx : unknown := get_mod_idx(group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , release_mod_names[release_flag{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_mod_idx} {Reuses: 0}
	declare tar_idx : unknown := get_target_idx(group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None, get_target_idx} {Reuses: 0}
	return (get_engine_par(engine_par{unknown} {no declaration} , group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , tar_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par})
end function

function is_release_group(subarticulation_id : int, group_idx : int)
	if((subarticulations_release_group[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (group_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	return (FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end if
	declare result : int {Reuses: 0}
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_LEGATO{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(((group_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) / NUM_MIC_POSITIONS{unknown} {no declaration} ) >= ((subarticulations_dynamic_layers[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + subarticulations_trans_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	if((((group_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) / NUM_MIC_POSITIONS{unknown} {no declaration} ) mod 2) = 1)
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function subarticulation_set_engine_parameter(subarticulation_id : int, param : int, value : int)
	if(subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	for group : unknown in range(subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + TITLE_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , (subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + TITLE_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} ) + subarticulation_group_count(subarticulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_group_count}, 1)
	set_engine_par(param{unknown} {no declaration} , value{unknown} {no declaration} , group{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	end if
end function

function last_transitions_add_event(instrument : int, keyswitch : int, subarticulation_idx : int, note : int, transition_type : int)
	declare idx : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare min : int := last_transitions_timecode[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare min_idx : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	if(transition_type{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 7
	if(last_transitions[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(min{unknown} {no declaration}  > last_transitions_timecode[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	min{unknown} {no declaration}  := last_transitions_timecode[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	min_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end for
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	last_transitions[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := (128 * transition_type{unknown} {no declaration} ) + note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	last_transitions_timecode[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	last_transitions[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , min_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := (128 * transition_type{unknown} {no declaration} ) + note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	last_transitions_timecode[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , min_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function last_transitions_contains(instrument : int, keyswitch : int, subarticulation_idx : int, note : int, transition_type : int)
	declare result : int := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	call last_transitions_update{UserDefined, None, last_transitions_update}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 7
	if(last_transitions[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = ((128 * transition_type{unknown} {no declaration} ) + note{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	last_transitions[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end for
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function last_transitions_update
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[_last_transitions{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	if(_last_transitions[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(_last_transitions_timecode[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2000))
	_last_transitions[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function redirect_output_ensemble(event : int, output_type : int, instrument : int)
	if(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration}  = NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	redirect_output(event{unknown} {no declaration} , output_type{unknown} {no declaration} , instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, redirect_output}
	end if
end function

function subarticulation_event_register_release_event(instrument : int, keyswitch : int, subarticulation_idx : int, event_id : int, octave_event_id : int)
	release_events_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := (release_events_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) mod MAX_CONCURRENT_RELEASE_EVENTS{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(release_events[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , release_events_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	fade_out(release_events[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , release_events_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration} , OLD_RELEASE_FADE_OUT_TIME{unknown} {no declaration}  * 1000, true){Builtin, None, fade_out}
	if(release_events[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , release_events_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	fade_out(release_events[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , release_events_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration} , OLD_RELEASE_FADE_OUT_TIME{unknown} {no declaration}  * 1000, true){Builtin, None, fade_out}
	end if
	end if
	release_events[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , release_events_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := event_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	release_events[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , release_events_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := octave_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(articulation_event_id : int, subarticulation : int)
	declare result : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	if(articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_event_list[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id(articulation_event_id : int, subarticulation : int, subarticulation_event_id : int)
	articulation_event_list[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := subarticulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function articulation_event_clear(articulation_event_id : int)
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	if(articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	articulation_event_list[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	articulation_event_subarticulation_inactive[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := false
	end for
	articulation_event_instrument[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	articulation_event_keyswitch[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	articulation_event_note[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	articulation_event_velocity[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	articulation_event_timestamp[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
end function

function articulation_event_is_event_active(articulation_event_id : int)
	declare is_active : int := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare trigger_clear : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	if(articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(articulation_event_list[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(articulation_event_list[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = EVENT_IN_PROGRESS{unknown} {no declaration} )
	is_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	trigger_clear{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(subarticulation_event_is_event_active(articulation_event_list[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_is_event_active} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	is_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	trigger_clear{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(articulation_event_list[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if(trigger_clear{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	trigger_clear{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
	if(trigger_clear{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	articulation_event_clear(articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_clear}
	end if
	return (is_active{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function articulation_event_get_free_index
	declare next_free_idx : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare idx : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare is_free : int {Reuses: 0}
	while((next_free_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1) and (idx{unknown} {no declaration}  < MAX_ARTICULATION_EVENTS{unknown} {no declaration} )) 
	if(articulation_event_is_event_active(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_is_event_active} = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(event_list_contains(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_contains} = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(delay_buffer_contains(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, delay_buffer_contains} = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	articulation_event_clear(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_clear}
	next_free_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end while
	if(next_free_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	message("Articulation Event Buffer Full"){Builtin, None, message}
	end if
	return (next_free_idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function articulation_event_get_free_index_except(articulation_event_id : int)
	declare next_free_idx : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare idx : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare is_free : int {Reuses: 0}
	while((next_free_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1) and (idx{unknown} {no declaration}  < MAX_ARTICULATION_EVENTS{unknown} {no declaration} )) 
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(articulation_event_is_event_active(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_is_event_active} = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(event_list_contains(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_contains} = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(delay_buffer_contains(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, delay_buffer_contains} = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	articulation_event_clear(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_clear}
	next_free_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end while
	if(next_free_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	message("Articulation Event Buffer Full"){Builtin, None, message}
	end if
	return (next_free_idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function update_keyswitch_presets_from_persistent_ids
	for i : unknown, id : unknown in pairs(keyswitch_preset_ids[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , *]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	keyswitch_preset[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := browser.find_preset(id{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	if(keyswitch_preset[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = nil)
	message("Could not find preset with id: " & ", " & id{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " for keyswitch: " & ", " & i{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " assigning empty preset"){Builtin, None, message}
	keyswitch_preset_ids[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end for
end function
