function articulation_update_minimal_delay(instrument_slot : int, keyswitch : int)
	articulation_minimal_delay[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(loaded_subarticulations_range_source[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = RANGE_SOURCE_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} )
	articulation_minimal_delay[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := lookahead{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_LEGATO{unknown} {no declaration} )
	articulation_minimal_delay[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(articulation_minimal_delay[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , (legato_delay_value_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) ? 25 : lookahead{unknown} {no declaration}  ){UserDefined, None, max}
	else
	articulation_minimal_delay[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(articulation_minimal_delay[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulations_start_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function update_minimal_delays
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare ii : int {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 1 - 1
	for ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 24 - 1
	articulation_update_minimal_delay(i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_update_minimal_delay}
	end for
	end for
end function

function articulations_on_note(instrument_slot : int, note : int, velocity : int, timing_offset : int, in_voice_selection : int)
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare articulation_event_id : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare set_articulation_event_id : int := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare delay : int {Reuses: 0}
	for ks{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 24 - 1
	if(((keyswitch_states[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (keyswitch_purge_states[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (pressed_keys[note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= keyswitch_enabled_time[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_event_get_free_index{UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_free_index}
	if(articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	delay{unknown} {no declaration}  := (((use_constant_delay{unknown} {no declaration}  * lookahead{unknown} {no declaration} ) + (ne(use_constant_delay{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne} * articulation_minimal_delay[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )) + timing_offset{unknown} {no declaration} ) + humanize_by_ms(articulation_humanization[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, humanize_by_ms}
	declare articulation_event_before : int := event_list_get_articulation_event(instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_get_articulation_event} {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(((loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1) and ((note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (octave_shift[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)) >= ((subarticulations_range_lower[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (subarticulations_octave_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)) - range_offset_lower{unknown} {no declaration} ))) and ((note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (octave_shift[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)) <= ((subarticulations_range_upper[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (subarticulations_octave_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)) + range_offset_upper{unknown} {no declaration} )))
	if((in_voice_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ) and ((((subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_SUSTAINED{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (((subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_ONESHOT{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_INTERVAL_SELECTION_SHORT{unknown} {no declaration} )) and ((pressed_keys[note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  <= 0) or (pressed_keys[note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ((ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - (nki_type{unknown} {no declaration}  = NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ) ? NOTE_SELECTION_TIME{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2 : 0 ) - (lookahead{unknown} {no declaration}  * use_constant_delay{unknown} {no declaration} )))))) or (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_INTERVAL_SELECTION_LONG{unknown} {no declaration} )) or (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_RUN{unknown} {no declaration} )))
	if(articulation_event_before{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	delay_buffer_add(articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} , velocity{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulations_interval_selection[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} , delay{unknown} {no declaration}  - subarticulations_start_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , last_articulation_event[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, delay_buffer_add}
	if(articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id} = - 1)
	articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id(articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_IN_PROGRESS{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id}
	end if
	set_articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration}

	articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id(articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_IN_PROGRESS{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id}
	end if
	set_articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	if(set_articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	event_list_add_articulation_event(instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} , articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_add_articulation_event}
	last_articulation_event[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	last_articulation_event[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	last_legato_event[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function articulations_note_off(instrument_slot : int, note : int)
	declare ks : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare release_offset : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare timing_offset : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	for ks{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 24 - 1
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	release_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	release_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  := ((lookahead{unknown} {no declaration}  * use_constant_delay{unknown} {no declaration} ) + release_offset{unknown} {no declaration} ) + (ne(use_constant_delay{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne} * articulation_minimal_delay[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if((murmation_active[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (active_notes[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  <= 1))
	murmation_active[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if((articulation_event_is_event_active(event_list_get_articulation_event(instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_get_articulation_event}){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_is_event_active} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_INTERVAL_LONG{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if(subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_INTERVAL_LONG{unknown} {no declaration} )
	declare note_iterator : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare interval_num : int := subarticulations_interval_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - subarticulations_interval_selection[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	pressed_notes_per_instrument[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for note_iterator{unknown} {no declaration}  := note{unknown} {no declaration}  - interval_num{unknown} {no declaration}  to note{unknown} {no declaration}  + interval_num{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((note_iterator{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0) and (note_iterator{unknown} {no declaration}  <= 127))
	if(event_list_get_articulation_event(instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , note_iterator{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_get_articulation_event} # - 1)
	if((pressed_notes_per_instrument[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , note_iterator{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = OFF{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (pressed_notes_per_instrument[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , (note_iterator{unknown} {no declaration}  + subarticulation_event_interval[articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(event_list_get_articulation_event(instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , note_iterator{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_get_articulation_event}, i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}]{unknown} {no declaration} ) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  = OFF{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	delay_buffer_add(event_list_get_articulation_event(instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , note_iterator{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_get_articulation_event}, instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , note_iterator{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 0, ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} , release_offset{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1){UserDefined, None, delay_buffer_add}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	else
	delay_buffer_add(event_list_get_articulation_event(instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_get_articulation_event}, instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 0, ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} , release_offset{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1){UserDefined, None, delay_buffer_add}
	end if
	else
	pressed_notes_per_instrument[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	pressed_notes_per_instrument_with_neighbors[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end for
	event_list_remove_articulation_event(instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_remove_articulation_event}
	end for
end function

function articulations_compute_level(articulation_event_id : int, subarticulation : int)
	declare instrument_slot : unknown := articulation_event_instrument[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare keyswitch : unknown := articulation_event_keyswitch[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare note : unknown := articulation_event_note[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare fade_level : real {Reuses: 0}
	declare modulation_value : int {Reuses: 0}
	if(loaded_subarticulations_range_source[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = RANGE_SOURCE_MODWHEEL{unknown} {no declaration} )
	modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_modulation_position(note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, get_modulation_position}
	else
	if(loaded_subarticulations_range_source[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = RANGE_SOURCE_VELOCITY{unknown} {no declaration} )
	modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_event_velocity[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration}  < loaded_subarticulations_start[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration}  > loaded_subarticulations_end[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	articulation_event_subarticulation_inactive[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := true
	end if
	else
	if(loaded_subarticulations_range_source[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = RANGE_SOURCE_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} )
	declare subarticulation_event : int := articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id} {Reuses: 0}
	declare time_of_release : int := last_released[note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if(subarticulation_event{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if(subarticulation_event_level[subarticulation_event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	time_of_release{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end if
	if((pressed_keys[note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0) and (time_of_release{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0))
	modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := int((real(min(lookahead{unknown} {no declaration} , (last_pressed[note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + lookahead{unknown} {no declaration} ) - time_of_release{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min}){Builtin, None, real} / real(lookahead{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}) * 127){Builtin, None, int}
	lbl_center_circle_indicator_time{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	message("Time Modulation Value: " & modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration}  & " for note " & note{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	else
	modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	lbl_center_circle_indicator_time{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	message("ENGINE_UPTIME: " & ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", time_of_release: " & time_of_release{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", modulation_value: " & modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	if((modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration}  < loaded_subarticulations_start[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration}  > loaded_subarticulations_end[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	articulation_event_subarticulation_inactive[articulation_event_id{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := true
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	fade_level{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulations_compute_fade_level(instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} , modulation_value{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulations_compute_fade_level}
	return (int(real(switch(use_expression{unknown} {no declaration} , expression_position{unknown} {no declaration} , 1000000){UserDefined, None, switch}){Builtin, None, real} * ((real(articulations_compute_volume_curve(articulation_volume_min[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , articulation_volume_max[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , real(get_modulation_position(note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, get_modulation_position}){Builtin, None, real} / 127, articulation_volume_curve[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulations_compute_volume_curve}){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * fade_level{unknown} {no declaration} )){Builtin, None, int})
end function

function articulations_compute_fade_level(instrument_slot : int, keyswitch : int, subarticulation : int, modulation_position : int)
	declare subarticulation_modulation_strength : real := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare fade_in_start : int := loaded_subarticulations_start[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare fade_in_range : int := loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare fade_out_end : int := loaded_subarticulations_end[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare fade_out_range : int := loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if(in_range(modulation_position{unknown} {no declaration} , fade_in_start{unknown} {no declaration} , fade_out_end{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	subarticulation_modulation_strength{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if(in_range(modulation_position{unknown} {no declaration} , fade_in_start{unknown} {no declaration} , fade_in_start{unknown} {no declaration}  + fade_in_range{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range} and (fade_in_range{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0))
	subarticulation_modulation_strength{unknown} {no declaration}  := real(modulation_position{unknown} {no declaration}  - fade_in_start{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / real(fade_in_range{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}
	else
	if(in_range(modulation_position{unknown} {no declaration} , fade_out_end{unknown} {no declaration}  - fade_out_range{unknown} {no declaration} , fade_out_end{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range} and (fade_out_range{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0))
	subarticulation_modulation_strength{unknown} {no declaration}  := real(fade_out_end{unknown} {no declaration}  - modulation_position{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / real(fade_out_range{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	return (subarticulation_modulation_strength{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function articulations_compute_volume_curve(min : int, max : int, x : real, curve : int)
	return (int(round(real(min{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} + (real(max{unknown} {no declaration}  - min{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} * pow(x{unknown} {no declaration} , (real(curve{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 100) + 1){Builtin, None, pow})){Builtin, None, round}){Builtin, None, int})
end function

function articulations_compute_modulation(instrument_slot : int, keyswitch : int, note : int, subarticulation : int, base : real)
	declare result : int {Reuses: 0}
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := int((base{unknown} {no declaration}  * (real(loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} + ((real(get_modulation_position(note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, get_modulation_position}){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * real(loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}))) / 127){Builtin, None, int}
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function humanize_by_ms(time : int)
	return (random(- time{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2, time{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2){Builtin, None, random})
end function

function articulation_compatible_with_ensemble(instrument_slot : int, keyswitch : int)
	for i : unknown in range(0, 4, 1)
	if(loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(subarticulations_visibility[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  < 2)
	return (FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end if
	end if
	end for
	return (TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function save_articulation_data_to_array(array : int[], start_idx : int, instrument : int, keyswitch : int)
	declare idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_volume_min[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_volume_max[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_volume_curve[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_humanization[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_release[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_icon[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_mw_to_velocity[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	declare subart_slot : int {Reuses: 0}
	for subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_start[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_end[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_volume[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_tightness[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_vibrato[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end for
	for subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_range_source[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_repetition_density[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end for
end function

function load_articulation_data_from_array(array : int[], start_idx : int, instrument : int, keyswitch : int)
	declare version : int := array[preset.VERSION_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	articulation_volume_min[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	articulation_volume_max[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}

	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}

	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	articulation_release[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	articulation_icon[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	articulation_mw_to_velocity[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	for subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	loaded_subarticulations_volume[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := (version{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1) ? array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  : array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 100 
	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	loaded_subarticulations_tightness[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
