	inc(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end for
end function

function event_list_get_articulation_event(instrument_slot : int, keyswitch : int, note : int)
	declare result : unknown := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	if((((((instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0) and (instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  < 1)) and (keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)) and (keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration}  < 24)) and (note{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)) and (note{unknown} {no declaration}  < 128))
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := event_list[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function event_list_remove_articulation_event(instrument_slot : int, keyswitch : int, note : int)
	if(((instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1) and (keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)) and (note{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
	if(event_list[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	event_list[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end if
end function

function event_list_add_articulation_event(instrument_slot : int, keyswitch : int, note : int, event : int)
	event_list[instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := event{unknown} {no declaration} 
	articulation_event_instrument[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := instrument_slot{unknown} {no declaration} 
	articulation_event_keyswitch[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	articulation_event_note[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	articulation_event_velocity[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := key_velocity[note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	articulation_event_timestamp[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function event_list_contains(articulation_id : int)
	declare result : int := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if(search[event_list{unknown} {no declaration} , articulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1)
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function delay_buffer_add(articulation_id : int, instrument : int, keyswitch : int, subarticulation : int, note : int, velo : int, interval : int, time : int, countdown : int, previous_note : int)
	declare idx : int := search[delay_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1] {Reuses: 0}
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	delay_buffer[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	delay_buffer_instrument[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := instrument{unknown} {no declaration} 
	delay_buffer_keyswitch[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	delay_buffer_subarticulation[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} 
	delay_buffer_note[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	delay_buffer_velo[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := velo{unknown} {no declaration} 
	delay_buffer_interval[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := interval{unknown} {no declaration} 
	delay_buffer_time[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := time{unknown} {no declaration} 
	delay_buffer_countdown[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := countdown{unknown} {no declaration} 
	delay_buffer_prev_note[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := previous_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	any_delay_event_queued{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	delay_buffer_highest_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(delay_buffer_highest_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}
	else
	message("WARNING: Delay Buffer Full"){Builtin, None, message}
	end if
end function

function delay_buffer_execute
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare ii : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare articulation_event_is_empty : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare all_inactive : int := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if(any_delay_event_queued{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to delay_buffer_highest_idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	delay_buffer_countdown[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := delay_buffer_countdown[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - LISTENER_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(delay_buffer_countdown[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  <= 0)
	if(delay_buffer_velo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if(((articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id} < 0) or (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_MURMATIONS{unknown} {no declaration} )) or (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_INTERVAL_LONG{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	declare previous_subart_id : unknown := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	if(delay_buffer_prev_note[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if(((articulation_event_instrument[delay_buffer_prev_note[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (articulation_event_keyswitch[delay_buffer_prev_note[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = delay_buffer_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (articulation_event_is_event_active(delay_buffer_prev_note[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_is_event_active} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	previous_subart_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(delay_buffer_prev_note[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}
	end if
	end if
	declare allow_through : bool := true {Reuses: 0}
	if(subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_INTERVAL_LONG{unknown} {no declaration} )
	declare existing_subart_event : int := articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id} {Reuses: 0}
	if(existing_subart_event{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	allow_through{unknown} {no declaration}  := false
	if(delay_buffer_interval[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > subarticulation_event_interval[existing_subart_event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	subarticulation_note_off(existing_subart_event{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_note_off}
	allow_through{unknown} {no declaration}  := true
	end if
	end if
	declare other_subart_id : unknown := articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(event_list_get_articulation_event(delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_note[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + delay_buffer_interval[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_get_articulation_event}, delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id} {Reuses: 0}
	message("other_subart_id: " & other_subart_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	if(other_subart_id{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	subarticulation_note_off(other_subart_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_note_off}
	end if
	end if
	if(allow_through{unknown} {no declaration}  = true)
	declare id : int := subarticulation_play_note(delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , loaded_subarticulations[delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_note[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_velo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_interval[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , get_next_rr(delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_note[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, get_next_rr}, articulations_compute_modulation(delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_note[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 1e+06){UserDefined, None, articulations_compute_modulation}, articulations_compute_level(delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulations_compute_level}, octave_shift[delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12, octave_layer[delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , previous_subart_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_play_note} {Reuses: 0}
	articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id(delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id}
	subarticulation_event_articulation_event[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_center_circle_indicator_velocity{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := delay_buffer_velo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if(loaded_subarticulations_range_source[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = RANGE_SOURCE_VELOCITY{unknown} {no declaration} )
	update_range_assignment_cursor(delay_buffer_velo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, update_range_assignment_cursor}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	else
	message("articulation id " & delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  & " already active"){Builtin, None, message}
	end if
	else
	if(articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id} >= 0)
	if(subarticulation_event_articulation_event[articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}]{unknown} {no declaration}  = delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	subarticulation_note_off(articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_note_off}
	end if
	articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id(delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_subarticulation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id}
	if(articulation_event_is_event_active(delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_is_event_active} = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = last_articulation_event[delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_note[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	last_articulation_event[delay_buffer_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , delay_buffer_note[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	delay_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	all_inactive{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = delay_buffer_highest_idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
	delay_buffer_highest_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := delay_buffer_highest_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	end if
	end if
	end for
	if(all_inactive{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	any_delay_event_queued{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function delay_buffer_contains(articulation_id : int)
	declare result : int := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if(search[delay_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} , articulation_id{unknown} {no declaration} ] >= 0)
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function get_modulation_position(note : int)
	return (int((real(modulation_positions[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} * (1 - (real(polyphonic_modulation_percentage{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 100))) + ((real(modulation_positions[note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} * real(polyphonic_modulation_percentage{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}) / 100)){Builtin, None, int})
end function

function set_modulation_position(note : int, value : int)
	modulation_positions[note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := value{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function cc_on_controller(note_number : int, use_smoothing : int)
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare e : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare modulation : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare level : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare smoothed_modulation : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare smoothed_level : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare weight : real {Reuses: 0}
	declare repeat : int {Reuses: 0}
	if(mnu_cc_smoothing{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	weight{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0.1
	else
	if(mnu_cc_smoothing{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	weight{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0.05
	end if
	end if
	repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for e : unknown in event_list{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(e{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	for i : unknown in range(0, 4, 1)
	if(articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(e{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id} >= 0)
	if((note_number{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1) or (subarticulation_event_note[e{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = note_number{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if(subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel(subarticulation_event_subarticulation[articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(e{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	modulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulations_compute_modulation(articulation_event_instrument[e{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , articulation_event_keyswitch[e{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , articulation_event_note[e{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1e+06){UserDefined, None, articulations_compute_modulation}
	level{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulations_compute_level(e{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulations_compute_level}
	if(((abs(subarticulation_event_modulation[articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(e{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}]{unknown} {no declaration}  - modulation{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} > 10000) and (mnu_cc_smoothing{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)) and (use_smoothing{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	smoothed_modulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := int(real(subarticulation_event_modulation[articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(e{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} + (weight{unknown} {no declaration}  * (real(modulation{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} - real(subarticulation_event_modulation[articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(e{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}))){Builtin, None, int}
	if(smoothed_modulation{unknown} {no declaration}  # modulation{unknown} {no declaration} )
	repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	smoothed_modulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := modulation{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(((abs(subarticulation_event_level[articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(e{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}]{unknown} {no declaration}  - level{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} > 1000) and (mnu_cc_smoothing{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)) and (use_smoothing{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	smoothed_level{unknown} {no declaration}  := int(real(subarticulation_event_level[articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(e{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} + (weight{unknown} {no declaration}  * (real(level{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} - real(subarticulation_event_level[articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(e{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}))){Builtin, None, int}
	if(smoothed_level{unknown} {no declaration}  # level{unknown} {no declaration} )
	repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	smoothed_level{unknown} {no declaration}  := level{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	subarticulation_set_modulation(articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(e{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}, smoothed_modulation{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_modulation}
	subarticulation_set_level(articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(e{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}, smoothed_level{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_level}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end for
	return (repeat{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function is_in_note_selection(idx : int, num_pressed_notes : int, note_selection : int)
	declare result : int := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	select(note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case NOTE_SELECTION_OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case NOTE_SELECTION_LOWEST{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq}
	case NOTE_SELECTION_LOWEST_TWO{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq} + eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){UserDefined, None, eq}
	case NOTE_SELECTION_LOWEST_AND_LOWER_MIDDLE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq} + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2){UserDefined, None, eq} * le(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, le})) + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , (num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2) - 1){UserDefined, None, eq} * gt(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, gt})
	case NOTE_SELECTION_LOWEST_AND_UPPER_MIDDLE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq} + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2){UserDefined, None, eq} * le(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, le})) + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , ((num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) / 2) + 1){UserDefined, None, eq} * gt(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, gt})
	case NOTE_SELECTION_MIDDLE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2){UserDefined, None, eq}
	case NOTE_SELECTION_MIDDLE_TWO{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (((eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2){UserDefined, None, eq} * le(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, le}) + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , (num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2) - 1){UserDefined, None, eq} * gt(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, gt})) + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  + (1 / 2)){UserDefined, None, eq} * le(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1, 3){UserDefined, None, le})) + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , (((num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) - 1) / 2) + 1){UserDefined, None, eq} * gt(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1, 3){UserDefined, None, gt})
	case NOTE_SELECTION_LOWER_MIDDLE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2){UserDefined, None, eq} * le(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, le}) + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , (num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2) - 1){UserDefined, None, eq} * gt(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, gt})
	case NOTE_SELECTION_UPPER_MIDDLE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2){UserDefined, None, eq} * le(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, le}) + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , ((num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) / 2) + 1){UserDefined, None, eq} * gt(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, gt})
	case NOTE_SELECTION_HIGHEST{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){UserDefined, None, eq}
	case NOTE_SELECTION_HIGHEST_TWO{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){UserDefined, None, eq} + eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2){UserDefined, None, eq}
	case NOTE_SELECTION_HIGHEST_AND_LOWER_MIDDLE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){UserDefined, None, eq} + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2){UserDefined, None, eq} * le(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, le})) + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , (num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2) - 1){UserDefined, None, eq} * gt(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, gt})
	case NOTE_SELECTION_HIGHEST_AND_UPPER_MIDDLE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){UserDefined, None, eq} + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2){UserDefined, None, eq} * le(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, le})) + (eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , ((num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) / 2) + 1){UserDefined, None, eq} * gt(num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, gt})
	case NOTE_SELECTION_LOWEST_AND_HIGHEST{unknown} {no declaration} 
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq} + eq(idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){UserDefined, None, eq}
	case -2147483648 to 134217727
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end select
	return (bool(result{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, bool})
end function

function update_selected_notes
	declare ks : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	pressed_key_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	message("last note input was " & (ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - last_note_input_time{unknown} {no declaration} ) & " ms ago"){Builtin, None, message}
	if((NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_RELEASE{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (last_note_input_time{unknown} {no declaration}  > (ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - input_acceptance_time{unknown} {no declaration} )))
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := nki_range[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  downto nki_range[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((pressed_keys_executed[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = false) or (NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  = NI_CB_TYPE_RELEASE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if(pressed_keys[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > (ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - input_acceptance_time{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	message("check note selection for note " & i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	pressed_keys_executed[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := true
	declare note_was_triggered : bool := false {Reuses: 0}
	for inst{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 1 - 1
	is_in_note_selection_boolean{unknown} {no declaration}  := is_in_note_selection((num_pressed_keys{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - pressed_key_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , num_pressed_keys{unknown} {no declaration} , note_selections[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, is_in_note_selection}
	if((is_in_note_selection_boolean{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (note_selection_number_of_notes[note_selections[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1))
	declare lower_adjacent : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare higher_adjacent : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	lower_adjacent{unknown} {no declaration}  := is_in_note_selection((num_pressed_keys{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - (pressed_key_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1), num_pressed_keys{unknown} {no declaration} , note_selections[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, is_in_note_selection}
	higher_adjacent{unknown} {no declaration}  := is_in_note_selection((num_pressed_keys{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - (pressed_key_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1), num_pressed_keys{unknown} {no declaration} , note_selections[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, is_in_note_selection}
	if((((pressed_key_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) >= 0) and (lower_adjacent{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )) or (((pressed_key_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) < num_pressed_keys{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (higher_adjacent{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )))
	is_in_note_selection_boolean{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	end if
	if(is_in_note_selection_boolean{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	note_was_triggered{unknown} {no declaration}  := is_in_note_selection_boolean{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1
	if((pressed_notes_per_instrument[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = OFF{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (nki_type{unknown} {no declaration}  # NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	pressed_notes_per_instrument[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := (is_in_note_selection_boolean{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) ? 1 : 0 
	pressed_notes_per_instrument_with_neighbors[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := (is_in_note_selection_boolean{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) ? 1 : 0 
	articulations_on_note(inst{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , max(1, key_velocity[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}, pressed_keys[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} , is_in_note_selection_boolean{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulations_on_note}
	end if
	end if
	end for
	if(not note_was_triggered{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(get_key_triggerstate(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_key_triggerstate} > 0)
	inc(pressed_key_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	end for
	end if
	for inst{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 1 - 1
	declare str : string {Reuses: 0}
	active_notes[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	str{unknown} {no declaration}  := "Instrument " & inst{unknown} {no declaration}  & ": "
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := nki_range[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  to nki_range[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(pressed_notes_per_instrument[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	inc(active_notes[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	str{unknown} {no declaration}  := str{unknown} {no declaration}  & i{unknown} {no declaration}  & " "
	end if
	end for
	end for
end function

function note_pressed_in_any_instrument(note : int)
	declare result : int := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	for inst : unknown in range(0, 1, 1)
	message("inst: " & inst{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", pressed_notes_per_instrument: " & pressed_notes_per_instrument[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	if(pressed_notes_per_instrument[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function update_num_pressed_keys
	num_pressed_keys{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i : unknown in range(nki_range[0]{unknown} {no declaration} , nki_range[1]{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
	num_pressed_keys{unknown} {no declaration}  := num_pressed_keys{unknown} {no declaration}  + get_key_triggerstate(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_key_triggerstate}
	end for
end function

function get_next_rr(instrument : int, keyswitch : int, subarticulation_idx : int, note : int)
	declare rr : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare allow_repetitions : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare rr_range : int := 3 {Reuses: 0}
	allow_repetitions{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(subarticulations_rrr[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	rr{unknown} {no declaration}  := (rr_data_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) mod subarticulations_rr_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	rr{unknown} {no declaration}  := random(0, subarticulations_rr_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){Builtin, None, random}
	end if
	else
	if((ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - rr_data_time[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) > subarticulations_rrr_reset_time[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	rr{unknown} {no declaration}  := (rr_data_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) mod subarticulations_rrr[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	rr{unknown} {no declaration}  := random(0, subarticulations_rrr[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){Builtin, None, random}
	allow_repetitions{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	if(loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	rr{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(subarticulations_rrr[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , (rr_data_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) mod subarticulations_rr_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}
	else
	rr{unknown} {no declaration}  := random(subarticulations_rrr[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulations_rr_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){Builtin, None, random}
	end if
	end if
	rr_data_time[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if((rr{unknown} {no declaration}  = rr_data_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (allow_repetitions{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	rr{unknown} {no declaration}  := (rr{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) mod subarticulations_rr_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	declare n : int {Reuses: 0}
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(subarticulations_range_lower[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration}  - rr_range{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max} to min(subarticulations_range_upper[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration}  + rr_range{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min}
	rr_data_idx[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := rr{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	return (rr{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function get_legato_data(legato_data_array : int[][][][][][], legato_offset_array : int[][][][][][], instrument : int, keyswitch : int, subarticulation_idx : int, note : int, layer : int, transition : int, offset : real)
	declare result : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	if((((((((instrument{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0) and (instrument{unknown} {no declaration}  < 1)) and (subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)) and (subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  < 4)) and (note{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)) and (note{unknown} {no declaration}  < 128)) and (layer{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)) and (layer{unknown} {no declaration}  < MAX_TRANSITION_DYN_LAYERS{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if((transition{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0) and (transition{unknown} {no declaration}  < MAX_TRANSITIONS_PER_NOTE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_array[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , layer{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + int(offset{unknown} {no declaration}  * real(legato_offset_array[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , layer{unknown} {no declaration} , note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, int}
	else
	if(transition{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_array[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , layer{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  + int(offset{unknown} {no declaration}  * real(legato_offset_array[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , layer{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, int}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function get_legato_data_volume_curve(instrument : int, keyswitch : int, subarticulation_idx : int, cc_value : int)
	declare result : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	if((((((instrument{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0) and (instrument{unknown} {no declaration}  < 1)) and (subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)) and (subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  < 4)) and (cc_value{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)) and (cc_value{unknown} {no declaration}  < 128))
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , cc_value{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

	declare dyn_layer_idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare note_idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare transition_idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare cc_value : int {Reuses: 0}
	for dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to MAX_TRANSITION_DYN_LAYERS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	for note_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	for transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to MAX_TRANSITIONS_PER_NOTE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_sus_release_time[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_sus_wait_time[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_trans_zone_start[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	end for
	end for
	end for
	for cc_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , cc_value{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve[cc_value{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	declare cc_value : int {Reuses: 0}

	for note_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	for transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to MAX_TRANSITIONS_PER_NOTE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_sus_release_time[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_sus_wait_time[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_trans_zone_start[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_trans_zone_volume[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset[dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_layer_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	end for
	end for
	end for
	for cc_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
