end function

function repetition_engine_listener
	declare any_event_played : int := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare any_event_active : int := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if(repetition_engine_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while((i{unknown} {no declaration}  < num_elements[repetition_played_subarticulation_events{unknown} {no declaration} ]) and (repetition_played_subarticulation_events[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)) 
	repetition_played_subarticulation_events[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	inc(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to repetition_engine_highest_idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	declare event : int := repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if(event{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	any_event_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(subarticulation_event_is_event_active(event{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_is_event_active} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	declare inst : int := articulation_event_instrument[subarticulation_event_articulation_event[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare ks : int := articulation_event_keyswitch[subarticulation_event_articulation_event[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare timing : int := repetition_interval_time[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if((((((ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  + repetition_interval_time_humanization[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) - repetition_engine_start_time{unknown} {no declaration} ) mod timing{unknown} {no declaration} ) < LISTENER_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (((ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - subarticulation_event_last_used[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) > (((timing{unknown} {no declaration}  - articulation_humanization[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) - LISTENER_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration} ) - (lookahead{unknown} {no declaration}  * use_constant_delay{unknown} {no declaration} ))) or in_range(ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - pressed_keys[subarticulation_event_note[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , LISTENER_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration}  + (lookahead{unknown} {no declaration}  * use_constant_delay{unknown} {no declaration} ), (LISTENER_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration}  + timing{unknown} {no declaration} ) + (lookahead{unknown} {no declaration}  * use_constant_delay{unknown} {no declaration} )){Builtin, None, in_range})) and ((pressed_notes_per_instrument[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_note[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0) or (sustain_pedal{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )))
	any_event_played{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	repetition_played_subarticulation_events[search[repetition_played_subarticulation_events{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1]]{unknown} {no declaration}  := event{unknown} {no declaration} 
	declare id : int := subarticulation_play_note(inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_articulation_event[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_subarticulation[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_note[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , max(1, (articulations_compute_modulation(inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_note[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 127){UserDefined, None, articulations_compute_modulation} * gt(ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - pressed_keys[subarticulation_event_note[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , timing{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, gt}) + (key_velocity[subarticulation_event_note[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * le(ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - pressed_keys[subarticulation_event_note[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , timing{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, le})){UserDefined, None, max}, subarticulation_event_interval[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , get_next_rr(inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_note[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, get_next_rr}, subarticulation_event_modulation[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_level[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , octave_shift[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12, octave_layer[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , event{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_play_note} {Reuses: 0}
	articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id(subarticulation_event_articulation_event[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id}
	subarticulation_event_articulation_event[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := subarticulation_event_articulation_event[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	declare ev : int := event{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	repetition_engine_remove(ev{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, repetition_engine_remove}
	subarticulation_event_fade_out(ev{unknown} {no declaration} , 100, TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_fade_out}
	end if
	else
	declare id : int := event{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	repetition_engine_remove(id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, repetition_engine_remove}
	dec(repetition_engine_highest_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	end if
	end if
	end for
	if(any_event_played{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	repetition_engine_update_tempo{UserDefined, None, repetition_engine_update_tempo}
	i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while((i{unknown} {no declaration}  < num_elements[repetition_played_subarticulation_events{unknown} {no declaration} ]) and (repetition_played_subarticulation_events[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)) 
	repetition_interval_time_humanization[articulation_event_instrument[subarticulation_event_articulation_event[repetition_played_subarticulation_events[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , articulation_event_keyswitch[subarticulation_event_articulation_event[repetition_played_subarticulation_events[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[repetition_played_subarticulation_events[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := humanize_by_ms(articulation_humanization[articulation_event_instrument[subarticulation_event_articulation_event[repetition_played_subarticulation_events[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , articulation_event_keyswitch[subarticulation_event_articulation_event[repetition_played_subarticulation_events[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, humanize_by_ms}
	inc(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	if(any_event_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	repetition_engine_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	repetition_engine_start_time{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end if
end function

function repetition_engine_update_tempo
	declare new_tempo : real := real(ms_to_ticks(60000000){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}){Builtin, None, real} / 960 {Reuses: 0}
	if((new_tempo{unknown} {no declaration}  # tempo{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_LISTENER{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare ii : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare iii : int {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 1 - 1
	for ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 24 - 1
	for iii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if((subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_ONESHOT{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0))
	repetition_interval_time[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := int((60000 / new_tempo{unknown} {no declaration} ) * (4 / real(loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real})){Builtin, None, int}
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end for
	tempo{unknown} {no declaration}  := new_tempo{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
end function

function repetition_engine_add(subarticulation_event : int)
	declare idx : int := search[repetition_engine_subarticulation_events{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1] {Reuses: 0}
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := subarticulation_event{unknown} {no declaration} 
	repetition_engine_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(repetition_engine_start_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	repetition_engine_start_time{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	repetition_engine_highest_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(repetition_engine_highest_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}
	else
	message("REACHED MAX_SUBARTICULATIONS_IN_REPETITION_ENGINE"){Builtin, None, message}
	end if
end function

function repetition_engine_remove(subarticulation_event : int)
	declare idx : int := search[repetition_engine_subarticulation_events{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_event{unknown} {no declaration} ] {Reuses: 0}
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	repetition_engine_subarticulation_events[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
end function

function murmation_engine_listener
	if(any_murmation_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	murmation_listener_counter{unknown} {no declaration}  := (murmation_listener_counter{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) mod MURMATION_LISTENER_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(murmation_listener_counter{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	declare step_time : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare play_time : int := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - murmation_start_time{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare ii : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare iii : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare any_event_active : int := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	any_murmation_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 1 - 1
	for ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 24 - 1
	for iii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(murmation_active[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	any_murmation_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	step_time{unknown} {no declaration}  := (MURMATION_LISTENER_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration}  * LISTENER_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration} ) * 10
	else
	step_time{unknown} {no declaration}  := ((DURATION_QUARTER{unknown} {no declaration}  * 4) / loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 1000
	while(step_time{unknown} {no declaration}  < ((MURMATION_LISTENER_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration}  * LISTENER_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration} ) * 10)) 
	step_time{unknown} {no declaration}  := step_time{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	end while
	end if
	if((play_time{unknown} {no declaration}  mod step_time{unknown} {no declaration} ) < (MURMATION_LISTENER_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration}  * LISTENER_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if(active_notes[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	murmation_active[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	any_event_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(murmation_rng(0, 100){UserDefined, None, murmation_rng} <= loaded_subarticulations_repetition_density[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	declare new_note_idx : int := murmation_rng(0, active_notes[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){UserDefined, None, murmation_rng} {Reuses: 0}
	declare new_note : int := get_note_from_idx(i{unknown} {no declaration} , new_note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, get_note_from_idx} {Reuses: 0}
	if(new_note{unknown} {no declaration}  = articulation_event_note[current_murmation_event[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	new_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_note_from_idx(i{unknown} {no declaration} , (new_note_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) mod active_notes[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, get_note_from_idx}
	end if
	if((new_note{unknown} {no declaration}  # articulation_event_note[current_murmation_event[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (current_murmation_event[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # event_list_get_articulation_event(i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , new_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_get_articulation_event}))
	declare delay : int := ((lookahead{unknown} {no declaration}  * use_constant_delay{unknown} {no declaration} ) - subarticulations_start_offset[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) + humanize_by_ms(articulation_humanization[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, humanize_by_ms} {Reuses: 0}
	if(current_murmation_event[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(abs(articulation_event_note[current_murmation_event[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - new_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} <= subarticulations_interval_num[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	delay{unknown} {no declaration}  := delay{unknown} {no declaration}  - (200 - get_legato_data(legato_data_trans_zone_start{unknown} {no declaration} , legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} , new_note{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, transition_notes_to_type(new_note{unknown} {no declaration} , articulation_event_note[current_murmation_event[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}, 1 - (real(min(ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - articulation_event_timestamp[current_murmation_event[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 500){UserDefined, None, min}){Builtin, None, real} / 500)){UserDefined, None, get_legato_data})
	end if
	end if
	delay_buffer_add(event_list_get_articulation_event(i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , new_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_get_articulation_event}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} , new_note{unknown} {no declaration} , 100, 0, ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} , max(25, delay{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}, current_murmation_event[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, delay_buffer_add}
	current_murmation_event[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := event_list_get_articulation_event(i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , new_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_get_articulation_event}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end for
	if(any_murmation_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	murmation_start_time{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	murmation_highest_rate{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
end function

function murmation_rng(min : int, max : int)
	declare seed : int {Reuses: 0}
	seed{unknown} {no declaration}  := (8088405 * switch(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  / 120, random(0, 1000000){Builtin, None, random}){UserDefined, None, switch}) + 1
	return (((sh_right(seed{unknown} {no declaration} , 8){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 16777215) mod ((max{unknown} {no declaration}  - min{unknown} {no declaration} ) + 1)) + min{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function get_note_from_idx(instrument : unknown, new_note_idx : int)
	declare search_idx : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	while(new_note_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0) 
	search_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[_pressed_notes_per_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , ON{unknown} {no declaration} , ((instrument{unknown} {no declaration}  * 128) + search_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ) + 1, (instrument{unknown} {no declaration}  * 128) + 128] mod 128
	dec(new_note_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	end while
	return (search_idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function update_purge
	message("execute purge command"){Builtin, None, message}
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare ii : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare iii : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare subarticulation_is_loaded[NUM_SUBARTICULATIONS{unknown} {no declaration} ] : int[] := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	array.reset(subarticulation_is_loaded{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, array.reset}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 1 - 1
	for ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 24 - 1
	if((ii{unknown} {no declaration}  / 8) < num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for iii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	subarticulation_is_loaded[loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := subarticulation_is_loaded[loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + keyswitch_purge_states[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end for
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to NUM_SUBARTICULATIONS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if(subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_NOT_FOUND{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(subarticulation_is_loaded[subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	subarticulation_purge(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , OFF{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_purge}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to NUM_SUBARTICULATIONS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if(subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_NOT_FOUND{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(subarticulation_is_loaded[subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	subarticulation_purge(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ON{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_purge}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function stop_all_events
	for inst : unknown in range(0, 1, 1)
	for ks : unknown in range(0, 24, 1)
	for i : unknown in range(0, 127, 1)
	declare articulation_event : int {Reuses: 0}
	articulation_event{unknown} {no declaration}  := event_list_get_articulation_event(inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_get_articulation_event}
	if(articulation_event{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	for subart : unknown in range(0, 4, 1)
	declare subarticulation_event : int {Reuses: 0}
	subarticulation_event{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(articulation_event{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}
	if(subarticulation_event{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	subarticulation_event_fade_out(subarticulation_event{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_fade_out}
	end if
	end for
	articulation_event_clear(articulation_event{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_clear}
	event_list_remove_articulation_event(inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_remove_articulation_event}
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end for
end function

	preset_path{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulations_path{unknown} {no declaration}  & get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_name{UserDefined, None, get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_name} & " Articulations/"
end function

function dev_keys.get_preset_path(user : int)
	if(user{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	return (user_preset_path{unknown} {no declaration} )
	else
	return (preset_path{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end if
end function

end function

function find_nka(array : any[], nka : string, search_depth : int)
	declare parent : string {Reuses: 0}
	declare it : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare _id : unknown := load_array_str(array{unknown} {no declaration} , get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_folder} & parent{unknown} {no declaration}  & nka{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str} {Reuses: 0}
	while((_id{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1) and (it{unknown} {no declaration}  < search_depth{unknown} {no declaration} )) 
	parent{unknown} {no declaration}  := parent{unknown} {no declaration}  & "../"
	_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(array{unknown} {no declaration} , get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_folder} & parent{unknown} {no declaration}  & nka{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
	inc(it{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	return (get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_folder} & parent{unknown} {no declaration}  & nka{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka")
end function

function find_key_nka(array : any[], nka : string, key : int, parent_folder : string, search_depth : int)
	array[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	declare local path : string {Reuses: 0}
	declare local it : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _id : unknown := load_array_str(array{unknown} {no declaration} , get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_folder} & path{unknown} {no declaration}  & parent_folder{unknown} {no declaration}  & nka{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str} {Reuses: 0}
	while(((_id{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1) and (it{unknown} {no declaration}  < search_depth{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (array[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # key{unknown} {no declaration} )) 
	array[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	path{unknown} {no declaration}  := path{unknown} {no declaration}  & "../"
	_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(array{unknown} {no declaration} , get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_folder} & path{unknown} {no declaration}  & parent_folder{unknown} {no declaration}  & nka{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
	inc(it{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	return (get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_folder} & path{unknown} {no declaration}  & nka{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka")
end function

function find_folder(array : any[], nka : string, key : int, parent_folder : string, search_depth : int)
	declare array_save : int := array[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	array[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	declare local path : string {Reuses: 0}
	declare local it : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare _id : unknown := load_array_str(array{unknown} {no declaration} , get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_folder} & path{unknown} {no declaration}  & parent_folder{unknown} {no declaration}  & nka{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str} {Reuses: 0}
	while(((_id{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1) and (it{unknown} {no declaration}  < search_depth{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (array[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # key{unknown} {no declaration} )) 
	array[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	path{unknown} {no declaration}  := path{unknown} {no declaration}  & "../"
	_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(array{unknown} {no declaration} , get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_folder} & path{unknown} {no declaration}  & parent_folder{unknown} {no declaration}  & nka{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
	inc(it{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(array[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	path{unknown} {no declaration}  := "../"
	end if
	array[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := array_save{unknown} {no declaration} 
	return (get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_folder} & path{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

	end if
	end for
end function

function set_release_envelopes
	for i : unknown in range(0, NUM_SUBARTICULATIONS{unknown} {no declaration} , 1)
	if(subarticulations_group_idx[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	declare default_release_attack : unknown := 440595 {Reuses: 0}
	declare default_release_hold : unknown := 712346 {Reuses: 0}
	declare default_release_decay : unknown := 718220 {Reuses: 0}
	declare default_sustain_release : unknown := 567309 {Reuses: 0}

	declare glissandi_array : int[] := [9, 10, 207, 208, 307, 308] {Reuses: 0}
	if(search[slow_bends_down_array{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1)
	subarticulation_set_envelope(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown} {no declaration} , 613429, FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_envelope}
	subarticulation_set_envelope(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_ENV_AHD{unknown} {no declaration} , ON{unknown} {no declaration} , TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_envelope}
	subarticulation_set_envelope(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown} {no declaration} , 365036, TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_envelope}
	subarticulation_set_envelope(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_HOLD{unknown} {no declaration} , 682409, TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_envelope}
	subarticulation_set_envelope(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_DECAY{unknown} {no declaration} , default_release_decay{unknown} {no declaration} , TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_envelope}
	else

	subarticulation_set_envelope(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown} {no declaration} , 673776, FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_envelope}

	subarticulation_set_envelope(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_HOLD{unknown} {no declaration} , default_release_hold{unknown} {no declaration} , TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_envelope}
	subarticulation_set_envelope(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_DECAY{unknown} {no declaration} , default_release_decay{unknown} {no declaration} , TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_envelope}
	else
	if(subarticulations_release_group[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	subarticulation_set_envelope(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_ENV_AHD{unknown} {no declaration} , ON{unknown} {no declaration} , TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_envelope}
	subarticulation_set_envelope(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown} {no declaration} , default_release_attack{unknown} {no declaration} , TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_envelope}
	subarticulation_set_envelope(subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_HOLD{unknown} {no declaration} , default_release_hold{unknown} {no declaration} , TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_envelope}

	update_page_buttons(1){UserDefined, None, update_page_buttons}
	else
	if(Utils.is_visible(pnl_mixer_page{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.is_visible} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	update_page_buttons(3){UserDefined, None, update_page_buttons}
	else

	update_page_buttons(2){UserDefined, None, update_page_buttons}
	show_single_articulation_name(ne(Utils.is_visible(pnl_credits{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.is_visible} .or. Utils.is_visible(pnl_settings{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.is_visible}){UserDefined, None, ne}){UserDefined, None, show_single_articulation_name}
	else
	update_page_buttons(0){UserDefined, None, update_page_buttons}
	show_single_articulation_name(ne(Utils.is_visible(pnl_credits{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.is_visible} .or. Utils.is_visible(pnl_settings{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.is_visible}){UserDefined, None, ne}){UserDefined, None, show_single_articulation_name}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if((Utils.is_visible(pnl_credits{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.is_visible} .or. Utils.is_visible(pnl_settings{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.is_visible}) = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	update_page_buttons(- 1){UserDefined, None, update_page_buttons}
	end if
end function

function display_value_in_control_label(uiid : int, value : string, unit : string)
	declare label : string {Reuses: 0}
	declare idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	if(active_label_displays_ignore{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	label{unknown} {no declaration}  := uiid{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[active_label_displays{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[active_label_displays{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1]
	active_label_displays[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := uiid{unknown} {no declaration} 
	active_label_displays_texts[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := label{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	active_label_displays_cb_ids[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	uiid{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := value{unknown} {no declaration}  & unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	wait(TEXT_LABEL_RESET_TIME{unknown} {no declaration}  * 1000){Builtin, None, wait}
	if(NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration}  = active_label_displays_cb_ids[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	uiid{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := active_label_displays_texts[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	active_label_displays[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end if
end function

function select_instrument_slot(slot : int)
	selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration}  := slot{unknown} {no declaration} 
	dev_keys.update_preset_paths{UserDefined, None, dev_keys.update_preset_paths}
	browser.categories.set_instrument_tags(get_currently_opened_instrument_idx{UserDefined, None, get_currently_opened_instrument_idx}){Undefined, None}
	browser.categories.set_ensemble_tag(NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration}  = nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	browser.categories.tags.export_control_array(btn_tags{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	message(get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_name{UserDefined, None, get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_name}){Builtin, None, message}
	lbl_instrument_name_ensemble{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := "               (" & instrument_name[loaded_instrument_types[slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ")"
	mnu_instrument_selector{unknown} {no declaration}  := slot{unknown} {no declaration} 
	update_keyswitch_selection{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_selection}
	if(pnl_editor_page{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} )
	editor_page_open{UserDefined, None, editor_page_open}
	else
	if(pnl_main_page{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} )
	main_page_open{UserDefined, None, main_page_open}
	end if
	end if
end function

function reset_to_main_page
	update_page_buttons(0){UserDefined, None, update_page_buttons}
	credits_close{UserDefined, None, credits_close}
	settings_close{UserDefined, None, settings_close}
	call main_page_open{UserDefined, None, main_page_open}
	call editor_page_close{UserDefined, None, editor_page_close}
	call mixer_page_close{UserDefined, None, mixer_page_close}
	show_keyswitches(TRUE{unknown} {no declaration}  * ne(eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_SINGLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}){UserDefined, None, ne}){UserDefined, None, show_keyswitches}
	PresetBrowser.show(false){UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.show}
end function

function update_page_buttons(page : int)
	btn_main_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := eq(page{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq}
	btn_browse_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := eq(page{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){UserDefined, None, eq}
	btn_editor_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := eq(page{unknown} {no declaration} , 2){UserDefined, None, eq}
	btn_mixer_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := eq(page{unknown} {no declaration} , 3){UserDefined, None, eq}
	set_font_types(get_ui_id(btn_main_page{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, font_footer_item{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_font_types}
	set_font_types(get_ui_id(btn_browse_page{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, font_footer_item{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_font_types}
	set_font_types(get_ui_id(btn_editor_page{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, font_footer_item{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_font_types}
	set_font_types(get_ui_id(btn_mixer_page{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, font_footer_item{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_font_types}
	if(page{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	set_font_types(get_ui_id(btn_main_page{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, font_footer_item_selected{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_font_types}
	else
	if(page{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	set_font_types(get_ui_id(btn_browse_page{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, font_footer_item_selected{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_font_types}
	else
	if(page{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	set_font_types(get_ui_id(btn_editor_page{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, font_footer_item_selected{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_font_types}
	else
	if(page{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	set_font_types(get_ui_id(btn_mixer_page{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, font_footer_item_selected{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_font_types}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
end function

function set_key_colors
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	set_key_color(i{unknown} {no declaration} , KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
	if((i{unknown} {no declaration}  >= nki_range[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (i{unknown} {no declaration}  <= nki_range[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	set_key_color(i{unknown} {no declaration} , KEY_COLOR_BLUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
	end if
	end for
	call keyswitches_color_keys{UserDefined, None, keyswitches_color_keys}
end function

	lbl_choose_mode_lookahead{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_label_small[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
end function

function check_for_legacy_delay_times
	if(legato_delay_value_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	declare found_legacy_legato : bool := false {Reuses: 0}
	for i : unknown in range(0, 1, 1)
	for ii : unknown in range(0, 24, 1)
	for iii : unknown in range(0, 4, 1)
	if(loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	message("Checking subarticulation ID " & loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	message("Type: " & subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	if(subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_LEGATO{unknown} {no declaration} )
	found_legacy_legato{unknown} {no declaration}  := true
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end for
	if(found_legacy_legato{unknown} {no declaration} )
	pnl_delay_warning{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_warning_display{UserDefined, None, update_warning_display}
	else
	pnl_delay_warning{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_delay_value_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
end function

function update_warning_display
	lbl_delay_warning{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := delay_warning_texts[delay_warning_page{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_delay_page{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := delay_page_texts[delay_warning_page{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_delay_update{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_delay_keep{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(delay_warning_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	btn_delay_update{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_delay_keep{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
end function

	set_control_par(uiid{unknown} {no declaration} , font_types[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , font_array[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end for
end function

function authoring_open

	update_authoring_transition(60, 60, 0){UserDefined, None, update_authoring_transition}

	declare idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	for idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[0, 0, 0, idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
end function

end function

function find_loaded_legato
	authoring_page_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(loaded_subarticulations[0, 0, 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if((subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[0, 0, 0]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_LEGATO{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[0, 0, 0]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_MURMATIONS{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	authoring_page_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_authoring_legato_title{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := subarticulations_display_name[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[0, 0, 0]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  & " (" & loaded_subarticulations[0, 0, 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ")"
	end if
	end if
end function

function update_authoring_transition(start_note : unknown, end_note : unknown, dynamic_layer : unknown)
	if(btn_authoring_follow{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	vlue_authoring_start_note{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := start_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	vlue_authoring_end_note{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := end_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(abs(start_note{unknown} {no declaration}  - end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} <= 12)
	authoring_interval_valid{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_sustain_release{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_sus_release_time[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_trans_start{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_trans_zone_start[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_trans_fadeIn{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_trans_volume{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_trans_zone_volume[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_trans_fadeOut{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_sustain_wait{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_sus_wait_time[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_sustain_fadeIn{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_sustain_release_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_trans_start_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_trans_fadeIn_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_trans_volume_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_trans_fadeOut_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_sustain_wait_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_sus_wait_time_offset[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[0, 0, 0, mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer{unknown} {no declaration} , start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , transition_notes_to_type(start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , end_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, transition_notes_to_type}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_authoring_labels{UserDefined, None, update_authoring_labels}
	else
	authoring_interval_valid{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(authoring_interval_valid{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	btn_authoring_blocker{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	btn_authoring_blocker{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function update_authoring_labels
	lbl_sustain_release{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := sli_sustain_release{unknown} {no declaration}  & " + " & sli_sustain_release_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  & " ms"
	lbl_trans_start{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := sli_trans_start{unknown} {no declaration}  & " + " & sli_trans_start_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  & " ms"
	lbl_trans_fadeIn{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := int((real(sli_trans_fadeIn{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 1e+06) * 750){Builtin, None, int} & " + " & int((real(sli_trans_fadeIn_offset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 1e+06) * 750){Builtin, None, int} & " ms"
	lbl_trans_volume{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := trim(real(sli_trans_volume{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 1000, 2){UserDefined, None, trim} & " + " & trim(real(sli_trans_volume_offset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 1000, 2){UserDefined, None, trim} & " dB"
	lbl_trans_fadeOut{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := int((real(sli_trans_fadeOut{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 1e+06) * 1000){Builtin, None, int} & " + " & int((real(sli_trans_fadeOut_offset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 1e+06) * 1000){Builtin, None, int} & " ms"
	lbl_sustain_wait{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := int((real(sli_sustain_wait{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 1e+06) * 500){Builtin, None, int} & " + " & int((real(sli_sustain_wait_offset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 1e+06) * 500){Builtin, None, int} & " ms"
	lbl_sustain_fadeIn{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := int((real(sli_sustain_fadeIn{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 1e+06) * 500){Builtin, None, int} & " + " & int((real(sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 1e+06) * 500){Builtin, None, int} & " ms"
end function

function transition_notes_to_type(start_note : unknown, end_note : unknown)
	return (abs(end_note{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_note{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} + (gt(end_note{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_note{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, gt} * 12))
end function

	update_main_buttons_display{UserDefined, None, update_main_buttons_display}

function show_dialog(dialog_mode : int)
	current_dialog_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := dialog_mode{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_dialog_textbox{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := dialog_texts[dialog_mode{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_dialog_confirm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := dialog_confirms[dialog_mode{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_dialog_cancel{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := dialog_cancels[dialog_mode{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((dialog_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  = DIALOG_MODE_UNMAPPED_SUBARTICULATION{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (dialog_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  = DIALOG_MODE_UPDATE_1_1{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	btn_dialog_cancel{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_dialog_confirm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_dialog_frame{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + ((lbl_dialog_frame{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - btn_dialog_confirm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) / 2)
	else
	btn_dialog_cancel{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_dialog_confirm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := ((lbl_dialog_frame{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + lbl_dialog_frame{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) - 75) - 55
	end if
	pnl_dialog{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(dialog_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  = DIALOG_MODE_UNMAPPED_SUBARTICULATION{unknown} {no declaration} )
	stop_all_events{UserDefined, None, stop_all_events}
	nki_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := false
	opened_dialog{unknown} {no declaration}  := true
	if(keyswitch_set_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	btn_dialog_confirm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	if(dialog_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  = DIALOG_MODE_UPDATE_1_1{unknown} {no declaration} )
	opened_dialog{unknown} {no declaration}  := true
	end if
	end if
end function

function dialog_on_persistence_changed
	if(opened_dialog{unknown} {no declaration} )
	show_dialog(current_dialog_mode{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, show_dialog}
	if(current_dialog_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  = DIALOG_MODE_UNMAPPED_SUBARTICULATION{unknown} {no declaration} )
	nki_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := false
	end if
	end if
end function

end function

	pnl_main_page{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function reload_all_legatos
	for i : unknown in range(0, 1, 1)
	for j : unknown in range(0, 24, 1)
	for k : unknown in range(0, 4, 1)
	if(loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , j{unknown} {no declaration} , k{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if((subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , j{unknown} {no declaration} , k{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_LEGATO{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , j{unknown} {no declaration} , k{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_MURMATIONS{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	buffer_legato_data("leg" & loaded_subarticulations[i{unknown} {no declaration} , j{unknown} {no declaration} , k{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, buffer_legato_data}
	move_legato_buffer_to_instrument(i{unknown} {no declaration} , j{unknown} {no declaration} , k{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, move_legato_buffer_to_instrument}
	message("Reloaded Legato for Instrument: " & i{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", Keyswitch: " & j{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", Subarticulation: " & k{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end for
end function

function update_mixer_channels
	for i : unknown in range(0, 5, 1)
	declare state : int := microphone_position_states[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 4)
	state{unknown} {no declaration}  := microphone_position_states[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_off{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_label_small[6 * ne(state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_on{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_label_small[6 * ne(state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := Utils.get_asset("tgl_horizontal", ne(state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}){UserDefined, None, Utils.get_asset}
	end if
	if(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration}  = NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	state{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_mixer_channel_enable[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	Utils.hide(btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ne(state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}){UserDefined, None, Utils.hide}
	lbl_mixer_channel_name[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_label_medium[state{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_mixer_channel_out[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_button_small[6 * ne(state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_mixer_channel_rev_send[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_button_small[6 * ne(state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_mixer_channel_solo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := Utils.get_asset("btn_solo", 1 - state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.get_asset}
	btn_mixer_channel_mute[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := Utils.get_asset("btn_mute", 1 - state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.get_asset}
	sli_mixer_channel_pan[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := Utils.get_asset("slider_pan", 1 - state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.get_asset}

	sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := Utils.get_asset("knb_small", 1 - state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.get_asset}
	mnu_mixer_channel_out[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_button_small[6 * ne(state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}]{unknown} {no declaration}

end function

function update_solo_selection
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare any_solo_active : int := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 5 - 1
	if(btn_mixer_channel_solo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	any_solo_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	if(any_solo_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 5 - 1
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown} {no declaration} , 396851 * btn_mixer_channel_solo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	else
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 5 - 1
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown} {no declaration} , 396851 * ne(btn_mixer_channel_mute[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, ne}, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	end if
end function

function mixer_page_ui_controls(uiid : int)
	declare idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[sli_mixer_channel_volume{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GN_GAIN{unknown} {no declaration} , sli_mixer_channel_volume[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	sli_mixer_channel_volume[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_GN_GAIN{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " dB"
	display_value_in_control_label(lbl_mixer_channel_volume[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_GN_GAIN{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp}, " dB"){UserDefined, None, display_value_in_control_label}
	end if
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[btn_mixer_channel_enable{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  < 4)
	microphone_position_states[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := btn_mixer_channel_enable[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	else
	microphone_position_states[idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := btn_mixer_channel_enable[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	microphone_position_states[idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (1 - btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	nks.bleed_remote{unknown} {no declaration}  := btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(nks.bleed_remote{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_LABEL{unknown} {no declaration} , bleed_names[btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
	end if
	declare ___print_string : string := "microphone_position_states[" & num_elements[microphone_position_states{unknown} {no declaration} ] & "]: " {Reuses: 0}
	for i : unknown in range(0, num_elements[microphone_position_states{unknown} {no declaration} ], 1)
	___print_string{unknown} {no declaration}  := ___print_string{unknown} {no declaration}  & microphone_position_states[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", "
	end for
	message(___print_string{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	set_control_par_str(btn_mixer_channel_enable[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_SHORT_NAME{int} {no declaration} , nks.bypass_text[btn_mixer_channel_enable[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
	update_mixer_channels{UserDefined, None, update_mixer_channels}
	update_purge{UserDefined, None, update_purge}
	end if
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[btn_mixer_channel_disable_input{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(mixer_channel_allowed[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  < 4)
	microphone_position_states[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	else
	microphone_position_states[idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	microphone_position_states[idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (1 - btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	btn_mixer_channel_enable[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	update_mixer_channels{UserDefined, None, update_mixer_channels}
	update_purge{UserDefined, None, update_purge}
	else
	microphone_position_states[idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	microphone_position_states[idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (1 - btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[sli_mixer_channel_pan{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_STEREO_PAN{unknown} {no declaration} , sli_mixer_channel_pan[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	sli_mixer_channel_pan[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_STEREO_PAN{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp}
	end if
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[btn_mixer_channel_solo{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	btn_mixer_channel_mute[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((btn_mixer_channel_solo[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> key_alt = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (btn_mixer_channel_solo[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> key_control = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 5 - 1
	btn_mixer_channel_solo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	btn_mixer_channel_solo[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := ON{unknown} {no declaration}  * btn_mixer_channel_solo[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> key_control
	end if
	update_solo_selection{UserDefined, None, update_solo_selection}
	end if
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[btn_mixer_channel_mute{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	btn_mixer_channel_solo[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((btn_mixer_channel_mute[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> key_alt = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (btn_mixer_channel_mute[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> key_control = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ))

	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 5 - 1
	btn_mixer_channel_mute[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for

	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0{unknown} {no declaration} , sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, - 1, 7, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 7, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " dB"

function load_mixer_preset(load_array : int[])
	declare abort : int {Reuses: 0}
	abort{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(load_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # UNIQUE_MIXER_PRESET_IDENTIFIER{unknown} {no declaration} )
	display_value_in_control_label(get_ui_id(lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, "This is not a valid mixer preset file.", ""){UserDefined, None, display_value_in_control_label}
	abort{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(load_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  # LUX_PRODUCT_ID{unknown} {no declaration} )
	display_value_in_control_label(get_ui_id(lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, "Loaded mixer preset file from incompatible product.", ""){UserDefined, None, display_value_in_control_label}
	abort{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(load_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  # MIXER_PRESET_VERSION{unknown} {no declaration} )
	display_value_in_control_label(get_ui_id(lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, "Loaded mixer preset file has an incompatible version.", ""){UserDefined, None, display_value_in_control_label}
	abort{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(load_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  # eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq})
	display_value_in_control_label(get_ui_id(lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, "Loaded mixer preset file has an incompatible type.", ""){UserDefined, None, display_value_in_control_label}
	abort{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(abort{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 5 - 1
	btn_mixer_channel_enable[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := load_array[NUM_MIXER_PRESET_CONSTANTS{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_mixer_channel_volume[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := load_array[(NUM_MIXER_PRESET_CONSTANTS{unknown} {no declaration}  + 5) + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_mixer_channel_pan[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := load_array[(NUM_MIXER_PRESET_CONSTANTS{unknown} {no declaration}  + (2 * 5)) + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := load_array[(NUM_MIXER_PRESET_CONSTANTS{unknown} {no declaration}  + (3 * 5)) + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := load_array[(NUM_MIXER_PRESET_CONSTANTS{unknown} {no declaration}  + (5 * 5)) + 10]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	active_label_displays_ignore{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	declare idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	for idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 5 - 1
	mixer_page_ui_controls(btn_mixer_channel_enable[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, mixer_page_ui_controls}
	mixer_page_ui_controls(sli_mixer_channel_volume[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, mixer_page_ui_controls}
	mixer_page_ui_controls(sli_mixer_channel_pan[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, mixer_page_ui_controls}
	mixer_page_ui_controls(sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, mixer_page_ui_controls}
	mixer_page_ui_controls(mnu_mixer_channel_out[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, mixer_page_ui_controls}
	end for
	if((nks.mix_preset_origin{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (pnl_mixer_page{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	mixer_page_open{UserDefined, None, mixer_page_open}
	else
	nks.mix_preset_origin{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	call nks.update_labels{UserDefined, None, nks.update_labels}
	active_label_displays_ignore{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
end function
