function update_range_assignment_circles
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	lbl_center_circle[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_center_circle_bound_left[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_center_circle_bound_right[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	lbl_center_circle[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "knb_line_lyr" & (i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) & center_circle_colors[loaded_subarticulations_range_source[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_center_circle[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} )
	lbl_center_circle_bound_left[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "knb_handle_lyr" & (i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) & center_circle_colors[loaded_subarticulations_range_source[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_center_circle_bound_right[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "knb_handle_lyr" & (i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) & center_circle_colors[loaded_subarticulations_range_source[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_center_circle_bound_left[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_center_circle_bound_right[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	declare start : int := loaded_subarticulations_start[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare end : int := loaded_subarticulations_end[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare lower : int := int(round((real(start{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * real(CENTER_CIRCLES_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration}  + ge(start{unknown} {no declaration} , 32){UserDefined, None, ge}){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, round}){Builtin, None, int} {Reuses: 0}
	declare upper : int := int((real(end{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * real(CENTER_CIRCLES_RESOLUTION{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, int} {Reuses: 0}
	lbl_center_circle[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := center_circles_frame_sums[lower{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + upper{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_center_circle_bound_left[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := start{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_center_circle_bound_right[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := end{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
end function

function update_center_circle_modes
	lbl_center_circle_indicator_modwheel{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_center_circle_indicator_velocity{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_center_circle_indicator_time{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i : unknown in range(0, 4, 1)
	if(loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(loaded_subarticulations_range_source[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = RANGE_SOURCE_MODWHEEL{unknown} {no declaration} )
	lbl_center_circle_indicator_modwheel{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(loaded_subarticulations_range_source[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = RANGE_SOURCE_VELOCITY{unknown} {no declaration} )
	lbl_center_circle_indicator_velocity{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(loaded_subarticulations_range_source[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = RANGE_SOURCE_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} )
	lbl_center_circle_indicator_time{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function update_circle_modwheel_position(modwheel : int)
	lbl_center_circle_indicator_modwheel{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := modwheel{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function center_circle_distance(x : real, y : real)
	declare dx : unknown := x{unknown} {no declaration}  - 0.5 {Reuses: 0}
	declare dy : unknown := y{unknown} {no declaration}  - 0.5 {Reuses: 0}
	return (sqrt((dx{unknown} {no declaration}  * dx{unknown} {no declaration} ) + (dy{unknown} {no declaration}  * dy{unknown} {no declaration} )){Builtin, None, sqrt})
end function

function center_circle_angle(x : real, y : real)
	declare dx : unknown := x{unknown} {no declaration}  - 0.5 {Reuses: 0}
	declare dy : unknown := y{unknown} {no declaration}  - 0.5 {Reuses: 0}
	declare cos_theta : unknown := dx{unknown} {no declaration}  / sqrt((dx{unknown} {no declaration}  * dx{unknown} {no declaration} ) + (dy{unknown} {no declaration}  * dy{unknown} {no declaration} )){Builtin, None, sqrt} {Reuses: 0}
	declare angle : unknown := acos(cos_theta{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, acos} {Reuses: 0}
	if(dy{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	angle{unknown} {no declaration}  := (2 * NI_MATH_PI{unknown} {no declaration} ) - angle{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	return (angle{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function angle_to_value(angle : real, angle_min : real, angle_max : real)
	declare new_angle : unknown := angle{unknown} {no declaration}  + (NI_MATH_PI{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2) {Reuses: 0}
	if(new_angle{unknown} {no declaration}  > (NI_MATH_PI{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2))
	new_angle{unknown} {no declaration}  := new_angle{unknown} {no declaration}  - (2 * NI_MATH_PI{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end if
	new_angle{unknown} {no declaration}  := abs(new_angle{unknown} {no declaration}  - (2 * NI_MATH_PI{unknown} {no declaration} )){Builtin, None, abs}
	return (int((127 * (new_angle{unknown} {no declaration}  - angle_min{unknown} {no declaration} )) / (angle_max{unknown} {no declaration}  - angle_min{unknown} {no declaration} )){Builtin, None, int})
end function

function find_matching_volume_preset
	declare found_preset : bool := false {Reuses: 0}
	for i : unknown in range(0, num_elements[keyswitch_volume_presets[*, 0]{unknown} {no declaration} ], 1)
	if(((articulation_volume_min[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = keyswitch_volume_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (articulation_volume_max[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = keyswitch_volume_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (articulation_volume_curve[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = keyswitch_volume_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} , 2]{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve{unknown} {no declaration}  := i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	found_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  := true
	break
	end if
	end for
	if(not found_preset{unknown} {no declaration} )
	mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve{unknown} {no declaration}  := 6
	end if
end function

function update_keyswitch_volume_curve
	sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := articulation_volume_min[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := articulation_volume_max[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_keyswitch_volume_curve{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := articulation_volume_curve[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * - 1
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height := articulations_compute_volume_curve(int((real(articulation_volume_min[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * 50){Builtin, None, int}, int((real(articulation_volume_max[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * 50){Builtin, None, int}, real(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / real(num_elements[lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope{unknown} {no declaration} ]){Builtin, None, real}, articulation_volume_curve[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulations_compute_volume_curve}
	lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y - lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height
	end for
	find_matching_volume_preset{UserDefined, None, find_matching_volume_preset}
end function

function update_keyswitch_volume_curve_cursor(modwheel : int)
	lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + int(real(lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 2){Builtin, None, real} * (real(modwheel{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127)){Builtin, None, int}
end function

function update_articulation_controls
	btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := articulation_mw_to_velocity[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_articulation_humanize{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := articulation_humanization[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(articulation_release[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	sli_articulation_release{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := articulation_release[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_articulation_release_blocker{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_articulation_release{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "knb_big"
	btn_articulation_release{unknown} {no declaration}  := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	lbl_articulation_release{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := "Release"
	btn_articulation_release_blocker{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_articulation_release{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "knb_big_disabled"
	btn_articulation_release{unknown} {no declaration}  := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	find_matching_volume_preset{UserDefined, None, find_matching_volume_preset}
end function

	lbl_keyswitch_name{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := articulation_names[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

end function

end function

function update_range_assignment_control
	if(selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	xy_range_assignment[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := real(loaded_subarticulations_start[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127
	xy_range_assignment[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := real(loaded_subarticulations_start[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127
	xy_range_assignment[4]{unknown} {no declaration}  := real(loaded_subarticulations_end[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127
	xy_range_assignment[6]{unknown} {no declaration}  := real(loaded_subarticulations_end[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127
	lbl_range_assignment_left{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_range_assignment_line_inactive{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + int(floor(xy_range_assignment[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  * real(lbl_range_assignment_line_inactive{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, floor}){Builtin, None, int}
	lbl_range_assignment_left_handle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_range_assignment_left{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x - 10
	lbl_range_assignment_constant{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_range_assignment_left{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + int(floor((xy_range_assignment[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  - xy_range_assignment[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * real(lbl_range_assignment_line_inactive{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, floor}){Builtin, None, int}
	lbl_range_assignment_constant{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := int(floor((xy_range_assignment[4]{unknown} {no declaration}  - xy_range_assignment[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * 225){Builtin, None, floor}){Builtin, None, int}
	lbl_range_assignment_fade_in{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_range_assignment_constant{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x - 225
	lbl_range_assignment_fade_in{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := int((xy_range_assignment[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  - xy_range_assignment[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * 224){Builtin, None, int}
	lbl_range_assignment_fade_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_range_assignment_constant{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + lbl_range_assignment_constant{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width
	lbl_range_assignment_fade_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := int((xy_range_assignment[6]{unknown} {no declaration}  - xy_range_assignment[4]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * 224){Builtin, None, int}
	lbl_range_assignment_right{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_range_assignment_line_inactive{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + int(xy_range_assignment[6]{unknown} {no declaration}  * real(lbl_range_assignment_line_inactive{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, int}
	lbl_range_assignment_right_handle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_range_assignment_right{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + 1
	end if
end function

function update_range_assignment_cursor(modwheel : int)

function update_dynamic_range_control
	xy_dynamic_range[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := real(loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127
	xy_dynamic_range[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := real(loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 127
	lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + int(xy_dynamic_range[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  * real(lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, int}
	lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left_handle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x - 10
	lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + int(xy_dynamic_range[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  * real(lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, int}) - 1
	lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right_handle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + 1
	lbl_dynamic_range_line{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	lbl_dynamic_range_line{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x - lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	update_dynamic_range_cursor(get_modulation_position(0){UserDefined, None, get_modulation_position}){UserDefined, None, update_dynamic_range_cursor}
end function

function update_dynamic_range_cursor(modwheel : int)
	lbl_dynamic_range_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x - 1) + int((real(clamp(modwheel{unknown} {no declaration} , 1, 127){UserDefined, None, clamp}){Builtin, None, real} / 127) * real(lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x - lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x){Builtin, None, real}){Builtin, None, int}
end function

	if(pnl_subarticulation_browser{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide = HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} )
	pnl_editor_parameters{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , max(0, selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)

	else
	btn_subarticulation_title{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := "    Empty"
	end if
	if(selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	displayed_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_solo_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := subarticulations_solo_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	else

	end if

	sli_subarticulation_trans_volume{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_subarticulation_trans_volume{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_subarticulation_trans_speed{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "slider_large"
	sli_subarticulation_trans_speed{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_subarticulation_trans_speed{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_label_small[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_subarticulation_trans_speed{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_subarticulation_trans_speed{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(btn_subarticulation_trans_speed{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	sli_subarticulation_trans_speed{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "slider_large_disabled"
	lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_label_small[6]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	if(subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_MURMATIONS{unknown} {no declaration} )
	mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	sli_subarticulation_repetition_density{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_subarticulation_repetition_density_title{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	call update_range_assignment_circles{UserDefined, None, update_range_assignment_circles}
	call update_range_assignment_control{UserDefined, None, update_range_assignment_control}
	btn_range_assignment_source_modwheel{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := eq(loaded_subarticulations_range_source[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , RANGE_SOURCE_MODWHEEL{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}
	btn_range_assignment_source_velocity{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := eq(loaded_subarticulations_range_source[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , RANGE_SOURCE_VELOCITY{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}
	call update_dynamic_range_control{UserDefined, None, update_dynamic_range_control}
	if(pnl_subarticulation_browser{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} )
	subarticulation_browser_open{UserDefined, None, subarticulation_browser_open}
	end if
end function

function editor_page_open
	pnl_editor_page{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration}  # NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	lbl_bg_upper{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "bg_upper_editor"
	end if
	call update_keyswitch_volume_curve{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_volume_curve}
	call update_articulation_controls{UserDefined, None, update_articulation_controls}
	call update_subarticulation_selection{UserDefined, None, update_subarticulation_selection}
	call update_keyswitch_settings{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_settings}
	call update_keyswitch_volume_curve_cursor(get_modulation_position(0){UserDefined, None, get_modulation_position}){UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_volume_curve_cursor}
	call update_range_assignment_circles{UserDefined, None, update_range_assignment_circles}
	call update_range_assignment_control{UserDefined, None, update_range_assignment_control}
	update_range_assignment_cursor(get_modulation_position(0){UserDefined, None, get_modulation_position}){UserDefined, None, update_range_assignment_cursor}
	call update_dynamic_range_control{UserDefined, None, update_dynamic_range_control}
	if(legato_delay_value_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1)
	pnl_delay_warning{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
end function

	declare articulation_event : int := subarticulation_event_articulation_event[subarticulation_event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}

	lbl_editor_overview_action_display[subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[subarticulation_event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
end function

function update_articulation_icon(idx : int)

	lbl_keyswitch_icon[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := articulation_icon[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function swi_keyswitch_pressed(inst_idx : int, ks_idx : int)
	Utils.doubleclick_start(swi_keyswitch[ks_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , btn_keyswitch_dc{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.doubleclick_start}
	if(swi_keyswitch[ks_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> key_alt = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	keyswitch_purge_states[inst_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , ks_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ne(keyswitch_purge_states[inst_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , ks_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}
	update_purge{UserDefined, None, update_purge}
	else
	if(swi_keyswitch[ks_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> key_shift = OFF{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for i : unknown in range(0, 24, 1)
	keyswitch_states[inst_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	end if
	if((swi_keyswitch[ks_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> key_shift = OFF{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (keyswitch_states[inst_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , ks_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration}  = OFF{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	keyswitch_states[inst_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , ks_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration}  := ks_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )
	keyswitch_enabled_time[inst_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , ks_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	declare first_other_selected_keyswitch : int := - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	for ks : unknown in range(0, 24, 1)
	if(((keyswitch_states[inst_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (ks{unknown} {no declaration}  # (ks_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )))) and (first_other_selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1))
	first_other_selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration}  := ks{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	if(first_other_selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration}  := first_other_selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	keyswitch_states[inst_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , ks_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration}  := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
end function

function swi_keyswitch_ui_controls(uiid : int)
	declare idx : unknown := search[swi_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ] {Reuses: 0}
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	for inst : unknown in range(0, 1, 1)
	swi_keyswitch_pressed(inst{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, swi_keyswitch_pressed}
	end for
	if(Utils.is_visible(PresetBrowser{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.is_visible} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	PresetBrowser.update_view{UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.update_view}
	end if
	update_keyswitch_selection{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_selection}
	Utils.doubleclick_check(btn_keyswitch_dc{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.doubleclick_check}
	if(btn_fade_ks{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	trigger_ks_fade(int((64 / 180) * 4000){Builtin, None, int}){UserDefined, None, trigger_ks_fade}
	end if
	return (true)
	end if
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[swi_keyswitch_purge{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	keyswitch_purge_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration}  := swi_keyswitch_purge[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	lbl_keyswitch[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_articulation_tile[(6 * ne(keyswitch_purge_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}) + ((1 * keyswitch_purge_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * keyswitch_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_keyswitch_note_name[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_label_small[(6 * ne(keyswitch_purge_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}) + ((1 * keyswitch_purge_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * keyswitch_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	update_articulation_icon(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, update_articulation_icon}
	update_keyswitch_selection{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_selection}
	update_purge{UserDefined, None, update_purge}
	return (true)
	end if
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[swi_keyswitch_search{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	swi_keyswitch[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for inst : unknown in range(0, 1, 1)
	swi_keyswitch_pressed(inst{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, swi_keyswitch_pressed}
	end for
	PresetBrowser.update_view{UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.update_view}
	articulation_browser_open{UserDefined, None, articulation_browser_open}
	update_keyswitch_selection{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_selection}
	swi_keyswitch_search[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	return (true)
	end if
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[btn_keyswitch_page_selector{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_keyswitch_page_selection{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_page_selection}
	return (true)
	end if
	return (false)
end function

function update_keyswitch_selection_base
	for i : unknown in range(0, 8, 1)
	swi_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := keyswitch_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_keyswitch_note_name[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := midi_note_names[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + (keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)]{unknown} {no declaration}

	lbl_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := "          "
	lbl_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> textline := "          "
	lbl_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> textline := articulation_names[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(keyswitch_purge_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	swi_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_ks_purge_search"
	if(LUX_EDITION_ID{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	swi_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_ks_purge_search_elements"
	end if
	else
	swi_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_ks_disabled"
	end if
	lbl_keyswitch[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_articulation_tile[(6 * ne(keyswitch_purge_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}) + ((1 * keyswitch_purge_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * keyswitch_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	update_articulation_icon(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, update_articulation_icon}
	swi_keyswitch_purge[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := keyswitch_purge_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_key_pressed((keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) + i{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + (8 * selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration}  * ne(eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_SINGLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}){UserDefined, None, ne}){Builtin, None, set_key_pressed}
	end for
	call update_all_ranges{UserDefined, None, update_all_ranges}
	selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := (nki_type{unknown} {no declaration}  = NKI_TYPE_SINGLE{unknown} {no declaration} ) ? 0 : editor_opened[selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	call editor_page_open{UserDefined, None, editor_page_open}

	call subarticulation_browser_open{UserDefined, None, subarticulation_browser_open}
	end if
	end if
end function

function keyswitches_color_keys_base
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 8 - 1
	set_key_color((keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) + i{unknown} {no declaration} , KEY_COLOR_RED{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
	if(keyswitch_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + (selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration}  * 8)]{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_key_color((keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) + i{unknown} {no declaration} , KEY_COLOR_ORANGE{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
	end if
	end for
	for i : unknown in range(0, 3, 1)
	set_key_color(keyswitch_page_to_note(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, keyswitch_page_to_note}, KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
	if((num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1) and (i{unknown} {no declaration}  < num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	set_key_color(keyswitch_page_to_note(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, keyswitch_page_to_note}, KEY_COLOR_YELLOW{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
	end if
	end for
end function

function keyswitches_on_note_base(note : int)
	wait_or_zero(lookahead{unknown} {no declaration}  * use_constant_delay{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, wait_or_zero}
	declare check_before : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare changed : int := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if(in_range(note{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12, ((keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) + 8) - 1){Builtin, None, in_range})
	declare inst : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare ks : int {Reuses: 0}
	for inst : unknown in range(0, 1, 1)
	for ks : unknown in range(0, 8, 1)
	for i : unknown in range(0, 3, 1)
	if(KEY_DOWN[keyswitch_page_to_note(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, keyswitch_page_to_note}]{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  # selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} )
	keyswitch_states[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration}  + (i{unknown} {no declaration}  * 8)]{unknown} {no declaration}  := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	check_before{unknown} {no declaration}  := keyswitch_states[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , (selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration}  * 8) + ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	keyswitch_states[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , (selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration}  * 8) + ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := KEY_DOWN[(keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) + ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(check_before{unknown} {no declaration}  # keyswitch_states[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , (selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration}  * 8) + ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	changed{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	keyswitch_enabled_time[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , (selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration}  * 8) + ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration}  := (note{unknown} {no declaration}  - (keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)) + (selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration}  * 8)
	end for
	end for
	if(changed{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(Utils.is_visible(PresetBrowser{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Utils.is_visible} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	PresetBrowser.update_view{UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.update_view}
	end if
	update_keyswitch_selection{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_selection}
	end if
	else
	if(in_range(note{unknown} {no declaration} , (keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) - 3, (keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) - ((3 - num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration} ) + 1)){Builtin, None, in_range})
	selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := note_to_keyswitch_page(note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, note_to_keyswitch_page}
	update_keyswitch_page_selection{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_page_selection}
	end if
	end if
end function

function keyswitches_on_release_base(note : int)
	declare ks : int {Reuses: 0}
	for ks{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 8 - 1
	set_key_pressed((keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) + ks{unknown} {no declaration} , keyswitch_states[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration}  + (selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration}  * 8)]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_pressed}
	end for
end function

function trigger_ks_fade(fade_time : int)
	ks_fade_time{unknown} {no declaration}  := fade_time{unknown} {no declaration} 
	declare event : int {Reuses: 0}
	array.reset(found_shared_legatos{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, array.reset}
	array.reset(_any_longs{unknown} {no declaration} , FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, array.reset}
	declare longs_in_new_keyswitches[1] : int[] {Reuses: 0}
	for inst : unknown in range(0, 1, 1)
	longs_in_new_keyswitches[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ks : unknown in range(0, 24, 1)
	if(keyswitch_states[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for subart : unknown in range(0, 4, 1)
	if(loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if((subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel(loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_RUN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	longs_in_new_keyswitches[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if((subarticulations_interval_selection[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) and (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_LEGATO{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if(search[found_shared_legatos{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulations_interval_selection[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ] = - 1)
	found_shared_legatos[search[found_shared_legatos{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]]{unknown} {no declaration}  := subarticulations_interval_selection[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end for
	end for
	update_num_pressed_keys{UserDefined, None, update_num_pressed_keys}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := nki_range[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  to nki_range[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for inst : unknown in range(0, 1, 1)
	for ks : unknown in range(0, 24, 1)
	declare legato_exception : int {Reuses: 0}
	legato_exception{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	event{unknown} {no declaration}  := event_list_get_articulation_event(inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_get_articulation_event}
	if(event{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	declare any_fadeouts : int {Reuses: 0}
	any_fadeouts{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(articulation_event_timestamp[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1))
	for subart : unknown in range(0, 4, 1)
	declare subart_event : int {Reuses: 0}
	subart_event{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(event{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id}
	if(((subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel(loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (longs_in_new_keyswitches[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (subarticulation_event_is_event_active(subart_event{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_is_event_active} = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if((((subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_LEGATO{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (subarticulations_interval_selection[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)) or (search[found_shared_legatos{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulations_interval_selection[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ] = - 1)) or (legato_exception{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	subarticulation_event_fade_out(subart_event{unknown} {no declaration} , ks_fade_time{unknown} {no declaration} , FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_fade_out}
	faded_events[i{unknown} {no declaration} , inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := subart_event{unknown} {no declaration} 
	any_longs[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	any_fadeouts{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	declare ks : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare subart_idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	find_first_active_keyswitch_with_legato_id(inst{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulations_interval_selection[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, find_first_active_keyswitch_with_legato_id}
	if(((articulation_event_keyswitch[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # ks{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (ks{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)) and (subart_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0))
	articulation_event_keyswitch[event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ks{unknown} {no declaration} 
	articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id(event{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id}
	articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id(event{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , subart_event{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_set_subarticulation_event_id}
	subarticulation_event_subarticulation_idx[subart_event{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := subart_idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	legato_exception{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	subarticulation_event_fade_out(subart_event{unknown} {no declaration} , ks_fade_time{unknown} {no declaration} , FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_fade_out}
	faded_events[i{unknown} {no declaration} , inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := subart_event{unknown} {no declaration} 
	any_longs[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	any_fadeouts{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
	if((any_fadeouts{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (longs_in_new_keyswitches[inst{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	declare unstarted_event : int {Reuses: 0}
	unstarted_event{unknown} {no declaration}  := FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for subart : unknown in range(0, 4, 1)
	if(articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id(event{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id} < - 1)
	unstarted_event{unknown} {no declaration}  := TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	if(unstarted_event{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	event_list_remove_articulation_event(inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, event_list_remove_articulation_event}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	global_fade_in[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(global_fade_in[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , any_longs[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}
	end for
	end for
	if((pressed_keys[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0) or (note_pressed_in_any_instrument(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, note_pressed_in_any_instrument} = ON{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	pressed_keys[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  * global_fade_in[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	pressed_keys_executed[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := false
	end if
	for inst : unknown in range(0, 1, 1)
	pressed_notes_per_instrument[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	end for
	update_selected_notes{UserDefined, None, update_selected_notes}
	wait(lookahead{unknown} {no declaration}  * 1000){Builtin, None, wait}
	array.reset(global_fade_in{unknown} {no declaration} , FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, array.reset}
end function

function ks_fade_note_off(note : int)
	for inst : unknown in range(0, 1, 1)
	for ks : unknown in range(0, 24, 1)
	for subart : unknown in range(0, 4, 1)
	if(faded_events[note{unknown} {no declaration} , inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	subarticulation_event_fade_out(faded_events[note{unknown} {no declaration} , inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 500, TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_event_fade_out}
	faded_events[note{unknown} {no declaration} , inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end for
end function

function find_first_active_keyswitch_with_legato_id(inst : int, id : int, ref ks_ref : int, ref subart_idx_ref : int)
	ks_ref{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	subart_idx_ref{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	for ks : unknown in range(0, 24, 1)
	if(keyswitch_states[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for subart : unknown in range(0, 4, 1)
	if(((loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0) and (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_LEGATO{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (subarticulations_interval_selection[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[inst{unknown} {no declaration} , ks{unknown} {no declaration} , subart{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = id{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ks_ref{unknown} {no declaration}  := ks{unknown} {no declaration} 
	subart_idx_ref{unknown} {no declaration}  := subart{unknown} {no declaration} 
	return ()
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end for
	return ()
end function

function update_keyswitch_page_selection
	ui_button_toggle_except(btn_keyswitch_page_selector{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ui_button_toggle_except}
	for i : unknown in range(0, 3, 1)
	set_key_pressed(keyswitch_page_to_note(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, keyswitch_page_to_note}, FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_pressed}
	end for
	mnu_keyswitch_set{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_keyswitch_set_disabled{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	set_key_pressed(keyswitch_page_to_note(selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, keyswitch_page_to_note}, TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_pressed}
	if(selected_keyswitch_page{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	mnu_keyswitch_set{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_keyswitch_set_disabled{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := " " & keyswitch_set_names[selected_keyswitch_set{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_keyswitch_set_disabled{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	update_keyswitch_selection{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_selection}
	keyswitches_color_keys{UserDefined, None, keyswitches_color_keys}
end function

function update_num_keyswitch_pages
	if(num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	btn_keyswitch_page_next{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_keyswitch_page_prev{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	btn_keyswitch_page_next{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_keyswitch_page_prev{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	for i : unknown in range(0, 3, 1)
	if((i{unknown} {no declaration}  < num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1))
	btn_keyswitch_page_selector[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_keyswitch_page_selector[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := ((UI_WIDTH{unknown} {no declaration}  - (num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration}  * 15)) / 2) + (i{unknown} {no declaration}  * 15)
	else
	btn_keyswitch_page_selector[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	keyswitches_color_keys{UserDefined, None, keyswitches_color_keys}
end function

function keyswitch_page_to_note(ks_page : int)
	return (((keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) - 3) + ks_page{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function note_to_keyswitch_page(note : int)
	return (note{unknown} {no declaration}  - ((keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) - 3))
end function

function keyswitches_color_keys
	keyswitches_color_keys_base{UserDefined, None, keyswitches_color_keys_base}
end function

function keyswitches_on_note(note : int)
	keyswitches_on_note_base(note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, keyswitches_on_note_base}
end function

function keyswitches_on_release(note : int)
	keyswitches_on_release_base(note{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, keyswitches_on_release_base}
end function

function update_keyswitch_selection
	update_keyswitch_selection_base{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_selection_base}
end function

function settings_open
	pnl_settings{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	update_main_buttons_display{UserDefined, None, update_main_buttons_display}
	credits_close{UserDefined, None, credits_close}
	btn_settings{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function settings_close
	pnl_settings{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	update_main_buttons_display{UserDefined, None, update_main_buttons_display}
	btn_settings{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function load_kontakt_effects
	declare string_type : int {Reuses: 0}
	string_type{unknown} {no declaration}  := eq(loaded_instrument_types[0]{unknown} {no declaration} , INSTRUMENT_TYPE_CELLO{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq} + eq(loaded_instrument_types[0]{unknown} {no declaration} , INSTRUMENT_TYPE_BASS{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}
	if(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration}  = NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	string_type{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	declare con_sordino_lf_freq[5] : int[] := [10000, 10000, 10000, 10000, 10000] {Reuses: 0}
	declare con_sordino_lf_gain[5] : int[] := [250000, 250000, 250000, 250000, 250000] {Reuses: 0}
	declare con_sordino_lmf_freq[5] : int[] := [500000, 500000, 500000, 500000, 500000] {Reuses: 0}
	declare con_sordino_lmf_gain[5] : int[] := [250000, 250000, 250000, 250000, 250000] {Reuses: 0}
	declare con_sordino_hf_freq[5] : int[] := [500000, 500000, 500000, 500000, 500000] {Reuses: 0}
	declare con_sordino_hf_gain[5] : int[] := [400000, 400000, 400000, 400000, 400000] {Reuses: 0}
	declare con_sordino_gain[5] : int[] := [440000, 440000, 440000, 440000, 440000] {Reuses: 0}
	for i : unknown in range(0, 5, 1)
	declare con_sordino_idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	con_sordino_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instrument_types[i{unknown} {no declaration}  * eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , EFFECT_TYPE_SOLID_GEQ{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 0, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}){Builtin, None, wait_async}

function set_up_nki
	declare output_channel_mapping : int[] := [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 4] {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to NUM_SUBARTICULATIONS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if(subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	declare count : int := subarticulation_group_count(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_group_count} {Reuses: 0}
	for ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to (count{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - TITLE_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + output_channel_mapping[ii{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 6]{unknown} {no declaration} , (subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + ii{unknown} {no declaration} ) + TITLE_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	end if
	end for
	subarticulation_set_engine_parameter(43, ENGINE_PAR_SPEED_UNIT{unknown} {no declaration} , 22){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_engine_parameter}
	subarticulation_set_engine_parameter(44, ENGINE_PAR_SPEED_UNIT{unknown} {no declaration} , 22){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_engine_parameter}
	subarticulation_set_engine_parameter(45, ENGINE_PAR_SPEED_UNIT{unknown} {no declaration} , 22){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_engine_parameter}
	subarticulation_set_engine_parameter(46, ENGINE_PAR_SPEED_UNIT{unknown} {no declaration} , 22){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_engine_parameter}
	subarticulation_set_engine_parameter(47, ENGINE_PAR_SPEED_UNIT{unknown} {no declaration} , 22){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_engine_parameter}
	subarticulation_set_engine_parameter(133, ENGINE_PAR_SPEED_UNIT{unknown} {no declaration} , 22){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_engine_parameter}
	subarticulation_set_engine_parameter(236, ENGINE_PAR_SPEED_UNIT{unknown} {no declaration} , 22){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_engine_parameter}
	subarticulation_set_engine_parameter(344, ENGINE_PAR_SPEED_UNIT{unknown} {no declaration} , 22){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_engine_parameter}
	subarticulation_set_engine_parameter(339, ENGINE_PAR_SPEED_UNIT{unknown} {no declaration} , 22){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_engine_parameter}
	subarticulation_set_engine_parameter(340, ENGINE_PAR_SPEED_UNIT{unknown} {no declaration} , 22){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_set_engine_parameter}
	load_kontakt_effects{UserDefined, None, load_kontakt_effects}
	declare preset_path : string := mixer_path{unknown} {no declaration}  & "01 Full Mix.nka" {Reuses: 0}
	wait_async(load_array_str(mixer_preset_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset_path{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, load_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
	load_mixer_preset(mixer_preset_array{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, load_mixer_preset}
	load_reverb_preset(mnu_mixer_rev_preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, load_reverb_preset}
	mnu_animations{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	mnu_animations{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 24 - 1
	set_key_pressed((keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) + i{unknown} {no declaration} , KEY_DOWN[(keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_pressed}
	set_key_color((keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12) + i{unknown} {no declaration} , KEY_COLOR_WHITE{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
	end for
	mnu_settings_keyswitch_position{unknown} {no declaration}  := keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration}  # NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	mnu_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	octave_shift[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	btn_fade_ks{unknown} {no declaration}  := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
