function subarticulation_browser_open
	pnl_subarticulation_browser{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	pnl_editor_parameters{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	pnl_editor_overview{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_subarticulation_browse{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_subarticulation_browse{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_back"
	subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all{unknown} {no declaration}  := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ui_button_toggle_except(btn_edit_subarticulation_selection{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ui_button_toggle_except}
	end if
	for i : unknown in range(0, num_elements[btn_subarticulation_browser_category{unknown} {no declaration} ], 1)
	if(subarticulation_browser_entries[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	btn_subarticulation_browser_category[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	btn_subarticulation_browser_category[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_browser_category"
	end if
	end for
	if(loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	subarticulation_browser_load_category(type_to_category[subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_browser_load_category}
	else
	subarticulation_browser_load_category(0){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_browser_load_category}
	end if
end function

function subarticulation_browser_close
	pnl_subarticulation_browser{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	pnl_editor_parameters{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	update_subarticulation_selection{UserDefined, None, update_subarticulation_selection}
	else
	pnl_editor_overview{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	btn_subarticulation_title{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_subarticulation_browse{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_subarticulation_browse{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_ks_browse"
end function

function gather_subarticulation_browser_entries
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	declare category_counter[1, 6] : int[][] := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to NUM_SUBARTICULATIONS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if((((subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0) and (subarticulations_group_idx[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)) and (((subarticulations_visibility[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3) or ((subarticulations_visibility[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2) and (nki_type{unknown} {no declaration}  = NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ))) or ((subarticulations_visibility[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) and (nki_type{unknown} {no declaration}  = NKI_TYPE_KEYSWITCH{unknown} {no declaration} )))) and ((subarticulations_editions[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, LUX_EDITION_ID{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) # 0))
	subarticulation_browser_entries[subarticulations_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}, type_to_category[subarticulations_type[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , category_counter[subarticulations_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}, type_to_category[subarticulations_type[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := subarticulations_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	category_counter[subarticulations_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}, type_to_category[subarticulations_type[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := category_counter[subarticulations_instrument[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}, type_to_category[subarticulations_type[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end if
	end for
end function

function subarticulation_browser_load_category(category : int)
	subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	selected_category{unknown} {no declaration}  := category{unknown} {no declaration} 
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[btn_subarticulation_browser_category{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = category{unknown} {no declaration} )
	btn_subarticulation_browser_category[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	btn_subarticulation_browser_category[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	declare selected_idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	selected_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SUBARTICULATION_BROWSER_MAX_ENTRIES_PER_CATEGORY{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if(subarticulation_browser_entries[loaded_instrument_types[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}, category{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(subarticulation_browser_entries[loaded_instrument_types[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}, category{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	selected_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries{unknown} {no declaration}  := i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	i{unknown} {no declaration}  := SUBARTICULATION_BROWSER_MAX_ENTRIES_PER_CATEGORY{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	message("selected_idx: " & selected_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & (subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries{unknown} {no declaration}  - 8)){Builtin, None, message}
	if(subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries{unknown} {no declaration}  <= 8)
	pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	selected_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height := int(195 / (real(subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real} / 8)){Builtin, None, int}
	selected_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := min(selected_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries{unknown} {no declaration}  - 8){UserDefined, None, min}
	end if
	subarticulation_browser_active_category{unknown} {no declaration}  := category{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_scroll_slider(selected_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_scroll_slider}
	if(loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	btn_subarticulation_browser_empty{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	btn_subarticulation_browser_empty{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
end function

function apply_scroll_offset
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[btn_subarticulation_browser_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(subarticulation_browser_entries[loaded_instrument_types[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}, selected_category{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := subarticulations_display_name[subarticulations_ids_positions[subarticulation_browser_entries[loaded_instrument_types[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}, selected_category{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(subarticulation_browser_entries[loaded_instrument_types[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * eq(nki_type{unknown} {no declaration} , NKI_TYPE_ENSEMBLE{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}, selected_category{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
end function

function set_scroll_slider(scroll_offset : int)
	declare scroll_area : int {Reuses: 0}
	scroll_area{unknown} {no declaration}  := 195 - lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height
	sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(0, scroll_area{unknown} {no declaration}  - ((scroll_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  * scroll_area{unknown} {no declaration} ) / (subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries{unknown} {no declaration}  - 8))){UserDefined, None, max}
	lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := 160 + ((abs(scroll_area{unknown} {no declaration}  - sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, abs} * (195 - lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height)) / scroll_area{unknown} {no declaration} )
	subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset{unknown} {no declaration}  := (abs(scroll_area{unknown} {no declaration}  - sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, abs} * (subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries{unknown} {no declaration}  - 8)) / scroll_area{unknown} {no declaration} 
	apply_scroll_offset{UserDefined, None, apply_scroll_offset}
end function

function subarticulation_browser_ui_controls(uiid : int)
	declare idx : int {Reuses: 0}
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[btn_subarticulation_browser_category{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	subarticulation_browser_load_category(idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_browser_load_category}
	end if
	idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[btn_subarticulation_browser_selection{unknown} {no declaration} , uiid{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if((ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - last_click{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 500)
	subarticulation_browser_close{UserDefined, None, subarticulation_browser_close}
	else
	loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := subarticulation_browser_entries[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation_browser_active_category{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_subarticulation_title{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := "    " & subarticulations_display_name[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_LEGATO{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_MURMATIONS{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	buffer_legato_data("leg" & loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, buffer_legato_data}
	move_legato_buffer_to_instrument(selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, move_legato_buffer_to_instrument}
	end if
	if(keyswitch_preset[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil)
	articulation_names[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := articulation_names[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  & "*"
	keyswitch_preset[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := nil
	keyswitch_preset_ids[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	articulation_icon[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	declare selected_subart_buffer : int {Reuses: 0}
	selected_subart_buffer{unknown} {no declaration}  := selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} 
	update_keyswitch_selection{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_selection}
	subarticulation_browser_load_category(subarticulation_browser_active_category{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, subarticulation_browser_load_category}
	selected_subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration}  := selected_subart_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} 
	editor_page_open{UserDefined, None, editor_page_open}
	update_purge{UserDefined, None, update_purge}
	update_all_ranges{UserDefined, None, update_all_ranges}
	update_minimal_delays{UserDefined, None, update_minimal_delays}
	end if
	last_click{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
end function

function bitlist.load(bit_list : int, val : int)
	bit_list{unknown} {no declaration}  := val{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function bitlist.count_blocks(bit_list : int)
	return (bitlist.count(.not. sh_left(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, sh_left} .and. bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){UserDefined, None, bitlist.count})
end function

function bitlist.size(bit_list : int)
	return (32)
end function

function bitlist.search(bit_list : int)
	return (ge(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, ge} * ((31 - real_to_int(log(int_to_real(max(1, 2147483647 .and. bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, log} / log(2){Builtin, None, log}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}) + (eq(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq} * - 32)))
end function

function bitlist.clear(bit_list : int)
	bit_list{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
end function

function bitlist.control_to_bitlist(bit_list : int, ui_array : int[])
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to min(31, num_elements[ui_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1){UserDefined, None, min}
	bitlist.set(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , ui_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, bitlist.set}
	end for
end function

function bitlist.bitlist_to_control(bit_list : int, ui_array : int[])
	declare i : int {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to min(31, num_elements[ui_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1){UserDefined, None, min}
	set_control_par(ui_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {no declaration} , bitlist.get(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bitlist.get}){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end for
end function

function bitlist.set(bit_list : int, idx : int, val : int)
	bit_list{unknown} {no declaration}  := .not. (.not. ((bit_list{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. .not. ((bit_list{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. (- val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}))) .and. .not. ((- val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. .not. ((bit_list{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. (- val{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}))))
end function

function bitlist.set_range(bit_list : int, start_idx : int, end_idx : int, val : int)
	bit_list{unknown} {no declaration}  := (eq(val{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){UserDefined, None, eq} * ((eq(end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 32){UserDefined, None, eq} * sh_right(- 1, 32){Builtin, None, sh_right}) + (bit_list{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. sh_left(.not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}, 32 - end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}))) + (eq(val{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, eq} * (lt(end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 32){UserDefined, None, lt} * (bit_list{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(.not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}, 32 - end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})))
end function

function bitlist.get(bit_list : int, idx : int)
	return (sh_right(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , 31 - idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 1)
end function

function bitlist.get_range(bit_list : int, start_idx : int, end_idx : int)
	return ((eq(end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 32){UserDefined, None, eq} * bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} ) + sh_left(sh_right(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , 32 - end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. .not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - start_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}, 32 - end_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})
end function

function bitlist.reverse(bit_list : int)
	for i : unknown in range(0, (32 / 2) + 1, 1)
	bitlist.swap(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , 31 - i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bitlist.swap}
	end for
end function

function bitlist.swap(bit_list : int, idx1 : int, idx2 : int)
	declare val_idx1 : int := bitlist.get(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , idx1{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bitlist.get} {Reuses: 0}
	declare val_idx2 : int := bitlist.get(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , idx2{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bitlist.get} {Reuses: 0}
	bitlist.set(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , idx1{unknown} {no declaration} , val_idx2{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bitlist.set}
	bitlist.set(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , idx2{unknown} {no declaration} , val_idx1{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bitlist.set}
end function

function bitlist.print(bit_list : int)
	declare bl : string := "[" {Reuses: 0}
	for i : unknown in range(0, 32, 1)
	bl{unknown} {no declaration}  := bl{unknown} {no declaration}  & bitlist.get(bit_list{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bitlist.get}
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  < (32 - 1))
	bl{unknown} {no declaration}  := bl{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", "
	end if
	end for
	bl{unknown} {no declaration}  := bl{unknown} {no declaration}  & "]"
	message(bl{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
end function

function vector.push_back(ls : any[], val : any)
	ls[max(1, ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){UserDefined, None, max}]{unknown} {no declaration}  := val{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
end function

function vector.clear(ls : any[])
	ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
end function

function vector.set(ls : any[], idx : int, val : any)
	ls[min(ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1, idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){UserDefined, None, min}]{unknown} {no declaration}  := val{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  > ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	inc(ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
end function

function vector.get(ls : any[], idx : int)
	return (ls[min(ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1, idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){UserDefined, None, min}]{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function vector.insert(ls : any[], idx : int, val : any)
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  > ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	vector.push_back(ls{unknown} {no declaration} , val{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, vector.push_back}
	else
	for i : unknown in range(ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1)
	ls[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ls[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	ls[idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := val{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
end function

function vector.combine(ls : any[], ls2 : any[])

	vector.push_back(ls{unknown} {no declaration} , vector.get(ls2{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, vector.get}){UserDefined, None, vector.push_back}
	end for
end function

function vector.erase(ls : any[], idx : int)
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  < ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for i : unknown in range(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2, ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1, 1)
	ls[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ls[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	end if
	dec(ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
end function

function vector.pop_back(ls : any[])
	declare back : unknown := ls[ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	dec(ls[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}

end function

end function

end function

	bl{unknown} {no declaration}  := bl{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", "
	end if
	end for
	bl{unknown} {no declaration}  := bl{unknown} {no declaration}  & "]"
	message(bl{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
end function

function array.remove(array : any[], idx : int)
	declare ii : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	for i : unknown in range(0, num_elements[array{unknown} {no declaration} ], 1)
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  # idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
	array[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ii{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	end for
end function

function array.clear(array : any[])
	for i : unknown in range(0, num_elements[array{unknown} {no declaration} ], 1)
	array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
end function

	array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := val{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
end function

function array.max(array : int[])

	for i : unknown in range(1, num_elements[array{unknown} {no declaration} ], 1)
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , result{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}
	end for
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function array.min(array : int[])
	declare result : unknown := array[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}

	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := min(array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , result{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min}
	end for

end function

	array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := func(array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	end for

	end for

	empty[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := original[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

function array.cumsum(array : number[], new_array : number[])
	for i : unknown in range(0, num_elements[array{unknown} {no declaration} ], 1)
	new_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := new_array[max(0, i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){UserDefined, None, max}]{unknown} {no declaration}  + array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
end function

	array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := array[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}

	end for
	Categories.style_favorite(Categories.favorite_tag{unknown} {no declaration} , Categories.favorite_position{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Categories.style_favorite}
	Categories.style_user(0, Categories.user_position{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Categories.style_user}
end function

function Categories.update_tag_state(categories : Categories, category_font : int[], tag_font : int[])
	for i : unknown in range(0, 7, 1)
	declare ii : unknown := max(0, i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3){UserDefined, None, max} {Reuses: 0}
	if(in_range(i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1, 3){Builtin, None, in_range})
	ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	declare count : int := categories.tagmask.get_range(categories.get_tags_until(ii{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}, categories.get_tags_until(ii{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Undefined, None}){Undefined, None}.count(1){Undefined, None} {Reuses: 0}
	if(bool(count{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, bool} = 1)
	lbl_category[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := BrowserFont.get_on(category_font{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, BrowserFont.get_on}
	else
	lbl_category[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := BrowserFont.get_disabled(category_font{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, BrowserFont.get_disabled}
	end if
	end for
	for i : unknown, tag : unknown in pairs(btn_tags{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(categories.tagmask.get(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} = 1)
	BrowserFont.apply(tag{unknown} {no declaration} , tag_font{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, BrowserFont.apply}
	else
	BrowserFont.apply_one(tag{unknown} {no declaration} , BrowserFont.get_disabled(tag_font{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, BrowserFont.get_disabled}){UserDefined, None, BrowserFont.apply_one}
	end if
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = Categories.favorite_tag{unknown} {no declaration} )
	tag{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := Categories.favorite_tag_pictures[categories.tagmask.get(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = categories.user_tag{unknown} {no declaration} )
	tag{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := Categories.user_tag_pictures[categories.tagmask.get(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	tag{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := Utils.get_asset("btn_browser_category", ne(categories.tagmask.get(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}){UserDefined, None, ne}){UserDefined, None, Utils.get_asset}
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

	else
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = categories.user_tag{unknown} {no declaration} )
	tag{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := Categories.user_tag_pictures[1]{unknown} {no declaration}

function Scrollarea.update_favorite(browser : Browser, btn_idx : int, value : int)
	declare current_idx : unknown := scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  + btn_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	_btn_favorite[btn_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	browser.filtered_presets[current_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .set_favorite(value{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	browser.filter_presets{Undefined, None}
	browser.update_disabled_tags{Undefined, None}
	if(browser.num_shown_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	browser.categories.tags.set(browser.categories.favorite_tag{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Undefined, None}
	browser.update_control_array(btn_tags{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	PresetBrowser.update_view{UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.update_view}
	end if
	Categories.update_tag_state(browser.categories{unknown} {no declaration} , BrowserFont.category{unknown} {no declaration} , BrowserFont.tag{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Categories.update_tag_state}
	PresetStrip.update_strip(browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, PresetStrip.update_strip}
	browser.export_favorite_array{Undefined, None}
end function

function Scrollarea.update_button(browser : Browser, btn_idx : int, font : int[])
	if(Scrollarea.is_idx_on_sight(browser.get_current_idx{Undefined, None}){UserDefined, None, Scrollarea.is_idx_on_sight} = 1)
	for button : unknown in range(0, 2 * 9, 1)
	_btn_preset[button{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	_lbl_preset_name[button{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := BrowserFont.get_off(font{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, BrowserFont.get_off}
	_lbl_preset_info[button{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := articulation_icon_states[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	end if
	browser.set_current_preset(scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  + btn_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	_btn_preset[browser.get_current_idx{Undefined, None} - scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 1
	_lbl_preset_info[browser.get_current_idx{Undefined, None} - scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := articulation_icon_states[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_lbl_preset_name[browser.get_current_idx{Undefined, None} - scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := BrowserFont.get_on(font{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, BrowserFont.get_on}
	vlue_preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := browser.get_current_idx{Undefined, None}
	browser.load_preset(browser.current{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	PresetStrip.update_strip(browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, PresetStrip.update_strip}
	EditStrip.update_strip(browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, EditStrip.update_strip}
end function

function Scrollarea.update_scroll_handle(browser : Browser)
	declare num_visible_rows : int := 2 {Reuses: 0}
	declare num_total_rows : int := ((browser.num_shown_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  + 9) - 1) / 9 {Reuses: 0}
	declare handle_size : int := sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height {Reuses: 0}
	if(num_total_rows{unknown} {no declaration}  > num_visible_rows{unknown} {no declaration} )
	handle_size{unknown} {no declaration}  := (sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height * num_visible_rows{unknown} {no declaration} ) / num_total_rows{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	lbl_scrollhandle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height := handle_size{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(handle_size{unknown} {no declaration}  < sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height)
	lbl_scrollhandle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + ((sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - handle_size{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ((sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * (sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - handle_size{unknown} {no declaration} )) / 1000000))
	lbl_scrollhandle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	lbl_scrollhandle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y
	lbl_scrollhandle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
end function

function Scrollarea.update_position(browser : Browser, preset_idx : int)
	declare add_line : int := bool(browser.num_shown_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 9){Builtin, None, bool} * 9 {Reuses: 0}
	declare scrollable_items : unknown := (browser.num_shown_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  - (2 * 9)) + add_line{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := (1000000 * (scrollable_items{unknown} {no declaration}  - scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} )) / scrollable_items{unknown} {no declaration} 
	Scrollarea.repaint(preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Scrollarea.repaint}
end function

function Scrollarea.focus(browser : Browser, preset_idx : int)
	declare target_row : unknown := preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  / 9 {Reuses: 0}
	declare current_start_row : unknown := scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  / 9 {Reuses: 0}
	declare current_end_row : unknown := (current_start_row{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2) - 1 {Reuses: 0}
	declare new_start_row : unknown := current_start_row{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	if(target_row{unknown} {no declaration}  < current_start_row{unknown} {no declaration} )
	new_start_row{unknown} {no declaration}  := target_row{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(target_row{unknown} {no declaration}  > current_end_row{unknown} {no declaration} )
	new_start_row{unknown} {no declaration}  := (target_row{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) + 1
	end if
	end if
	declare num_total_rows : unknown := ((browser.num_shown_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  + 9) - 1) / 9 {Reuses: 0}
	declare max_start_row : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	if(num_total_rows{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	max_start_row{unknown} {no declaration}  := num_total_rows{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2
	end if
	new_start_row{unknown} {no declaration}  := clip(new_start_row{unknown} {no declaration} , max_start_row{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, clip}
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := new_start_row{unknown} {no declaration}  * 9
	Scrollarea.update_position(browser{unknown} {no declaration} , preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Scrollarea.update_position}
end function

function Scrollarea.focus_tight(browser : Browser, preset_idx : int)
	if(Scrollarea.is_idx_on_sight(preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Scrollarea.is_idx_on_sight} = 0)
	if(scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  < preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := (preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - (2 * 9)) + 1
	else
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	Scrollarea.update_position(browser{unknown} {no declaration} , preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Scrollarea.update_position}
end function

function Scrollarea.is_idx_on_sight(preset_idx : int)
	declare min_idx : int := scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	declare max_idx : int := scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  + (2 * 9) {Reuses: 0}
	if((preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  >= min_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  < max_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	return (1)
	else
	return (0)
	end if
end function

function Scrollarea.repaint(preset_idx : int)
	declare current_idx : unknown := scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  {Reuses: 0}
	for i : unknown in range(0, 2, 1)
	for ii : unknown in range(0, 9, 1)
	declare hide : int := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	if(current_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  < browser.num_shown_presets{unknown} {no declaration} )
	hide{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	Scrollarea.update_preset_button(i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} , browser.filtered_presets[current_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .name{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Scrollarea.update_preset_button}
	lbl_preset_info[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := browser.filtered_presets[current_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .icon{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(current_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  = preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
	btn_preset[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 1
	lbl_preset_name[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := BrowserFont.get_on(BrowserFont.preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, BrowserFont.get_on}
	lbl_preset_info[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := articulation_icon_states[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	btn_preset[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	lbl_preset_name[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := BrowserFont.get_off(BrowserFont.preset{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, BrowserFont.get_off}
	lbl_preset_info[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := articulation_icon_states[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	btn_favorite[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := browser.filtered_presets[current_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} .is_favorite{Undefined, None}
	end if
	btn_preset[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := Utils.hide_state[hide{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_preset_name[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := Utils.hide_state[hide{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_preset_info[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := Utils.hide_state[hide{unknown} {no declaration}  * Scrollarea.show_info{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_favorite[i{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := Utils.hide_state[hide{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(current_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end for
	end for
	Scrollarea.update_scroll_handle(browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Scrollarea.update_scroll_handle}
	lbl_presetcount{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := browser.num_shown_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  & "/" & browser.num_presets{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function PresetBrowser.update_ks_selector(current_idx : int)
	declare x_pos : int := (3 - num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration} ) * (((16 + 2) * 8) + 8) {Reuses: 0}
	for i : unknown, ks : unknown in pairs(btn_ks_selector{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ks{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	ks{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := ""
	ks{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := 16
	ks{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  >= (num_keyswitch_pages{unknown} {no declaration}  * 8))
	ks{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = current_idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
	browser.current{unknown} {no declaration}  := nil
	if(keyswitch_preset[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil)
	browser.current{unknown} {no declaration}  := keyswitch_preset[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ks{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := midi_note_names[(i{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 8) + (keyswitch_octave{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ks{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := 31
	ks{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 1
	end if
	ks{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := x_pos{unknown} {no declaration} 
	x_pos{unknown} {no declaration}  := x_pos{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ks{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width + 2) + (((i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) mod 8) = 0) ? 8 : 0 )
	end for
end function

function PresetBrowser.update_view
	PresetBrowser.update_ks_selector(selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.update_ks_selector}
	browser.update_category_tags(btn_tags{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	browser.filter_presets{Undefined, None}
	browser.update_disabled_tags{Undefined, None}
	Categories.update_tag_state(browser.categories{unknown} {no declaration} , BrowserFont.category{unknown} {no declaration} , BrowserFont.tag{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Categories.update_tag_state}
	Scrollarea.focus(browser{unknown} {no declaration} , browser.get_current_idx{Undefined, None}){UserDefined, None, Scrollarea.focus}
	vlue_preset_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := browser.get_current_idx{Undefined, None}
	PresetStrip.update_strip(browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, PresetStrip.update_strip}
	EditStrip.update_strip(browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, EditStrip.update_strip}
end function

function create_fallback_preset
	fallback_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  := Preset::__init__(- 1, "", nil, 0, "", 0){Constructor, None, Preset::__init__}
	if(browser.current{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil)
	message("here"){Builtin, None, message}
	fallback_preset.copy(browser.current{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	end if
	fallback_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_current_articulation_name{UserDefined, None, get_current_articulation_name}
	fallback_preset.icon{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_current_articulation_icon{UserDefined, None, get_current_articulation_icon}
	PresetBrowser.save_preset_array(preset.array_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.save_preset_array}
	message("Saved current preset state to buffer"){Builtin, None, message}
	PresetBrowser.save_preset_array(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.save_preset_array}
end function

function PresetBrowser.show(val : bool)
	if(val{unknown} {no declaration} )
	create_fallback_preset{UserDefined, None, create_fallback_preset}
	message(fallback_preset.name{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", " & " is the fallback preset"){Builtin, None, message}
	if(legato_delay_value_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1)
	pnl_delay_warning{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	if(browser.current_state{unknown} {no declaration}  # browser_state.NONE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	btn_save_cancel{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	UserSaveStrip.show(btn_save_cancel{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, UserSaveStrip.show}
	browser.current_state{unknown} {no declaration}  := browser_state.NONE{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_dev_edit_tags{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	browser.categories.clear_tags(btn_tags{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	Categories.idle_mode(browser{unknown} {no declaration} , BrowserFont.category{unknown} {no declaration} , BrowserFont.tag{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Categories.idle_mode}
	end if
	end if
	PresetBrowser{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := Utils.hide_state[val{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	update_main_buttons_display{UserDefined, None, update_main_buttons_display}
end function

function PresetBrowser.on_async_complete(ni_async_id : unknown, ni_async_exit_status : unknown)
	if(ni_async_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(ni_async_exit_status{unknown} {no declaration}  = TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	else
	if(ni_async_exit_status{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
end function

function PresetBrowser.save_preset_array(array : int[])
	save_articulation_data_to_array(array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.CONTENT_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, save_articulation_data_to_array}
end function

function PresetBrowser.load_preset_array(array : int[])
	stop_all_events{UserDefined, None, stop_all_events}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS{unknown} {no declaration} , TRUE{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	load_articulation_data_from_array(array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.CONTENT_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, load_articulation_data_from_array}
	for subarticulation : unknown in range(0, 4, 1)
	if(loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)
	if((subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_LEGATO{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (subarticulations_type[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = SUBARTICULATION_TYPE_MURMATIONS{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	buffer_legato_data("leg" & loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, buffer_legato_data}
	move_legato_buffer_to_instrument(selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, move_legato_buffer_to_instrument}
	end if
	if(subarticulations_group_idx[subarticulations_ids_positions[loaded_subarticulations[selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} , subarticulation{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	show_dialog(DIALOG_MODE_UNMAPPED_SUBARTICULATION{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, show_dialog}
	end if
	end if
	end for
	browser.current{unknown} {no declaration}  := browser.find_preset(array[preset.ID_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None}
	if(((browser.current{unknown} {no declaration}  # nil) and (nki_type{unknown} {no declaration}  # NKI_TYPE_SINGLE{unknown} {no declaration} )) or (NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	set_current_keyswitch_preset(browser.current{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_current_keyswitch_preset}
	set_current_keyswitch_preset_id(browser.current.id{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_current_keyswitch_preset_id}
	set_current_articulation_name(browser.current.name{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_current_articulation_name}
	set_current_articulation_icon(browser.current.icon{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, set_current_articulation_icon}
	end if
	articulation_update_minimal_delay(selected_instrument{unknown} {no declaration} , selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, articulation_update_minimal_delay}
	editor_opened[selected_keyswitch{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	if(keyswitch_set_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  = FALSE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	update_purge{UserDefined, None, update_purge}
	update_keyswitch_selection{UserDefined, None, update_keyswitch_selection}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS{unknown} {no declaration} , ne(btn_mixer_rev_title{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end if
end function

function articulation_browser_close
	PresetBrowser.show(false){UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.show}
end function

function articulation_browser_open
	PresetBrowser.show(true){UserDefined, None, PresetBrowser.show}
end function

function show_single_articulation_name(bool : int)
end function

function wait_or_zero(wait_time : int)
	if(wait_time{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	wait(wait_time{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
end function

function ui_button_toggle_except(ui_array : unknown, exception_idx : unknown)
	declare idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[ui_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	if(idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # exception_idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ui_array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := OFF{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ui_array[idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := ON{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
end function

function switch(bool : int, on_value : int, off_value : int)
	declare result : int {Reuses: 0}
	if(bool{unknown} {no declaration}  = ON{unknown} {no declaration} )
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := on_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := off_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function switch3(selector : int, value1 : int, value2 : int, value3 : int)
	declare result : int {Reuses: 0}
	if(selector{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := value1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(selector{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := value2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := value3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	return (result{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

	end for
	btn_mixer_eq_title{unknown} {no declaration}  := ne(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 1, NI_MAIN_BUS{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par}){UserDefined, None, ne}
	btn_mixer_comp_title{unknown} {no declaration}  := ne(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 2, NI_MAIN_BUS{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par}){UserDefined, None, ne}

function CKSP::sh_right_logical(x : int, n : int)
	return (sh_right(x{unknown} {no declaration} , n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Undefined, None} .and. (sh_left(1, (32 - n{unknown} {no declaration} ) .and. 31){Undefined, None} - 1))
end function

function CKSP::__bool__(x : int)
	return (- sh_right(x{unknown} {no declaration}  .xor. - x{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function CKSP::__ge__(a : int, b : int)
	return (sh_right(a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} + 1)
end function

function CKSP::__lt__(a : int, b : int)
	return (- sh_right(a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function CKSP::__ne__(a : int, b : int)
	return (1 - - sh_right(abs(a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function CKSP::__eq__(a : int, b : int)
	return (- sh_right(abs(a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function CKSP::__le__(a : int, b : int)
	return (1 + sh_right(b{unknown} {no declaration}  - a{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function CKSP::__gt__(a : int, b : int)
	return (- sh_right(b{unknown} {no declaration}  - a{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function
